+            let minLeft = 10;
+            let maxRight = window.innerWidth - 10;
+            
+            if (parentEl) {
+                const parentRect = parentEl.getBoundingClientRect();
+                minLeft = Math.max(minLeft, parentRect.left + 5);
+                maxRight = Math.min(maxRight, parentRect.right - 5);
+            }
+

+            let tooltipLeft = rect.left + (rect.width / 2) - (tooltipWidth / 2);
+            
+            // Constreñir el tooltip para que no se salga por la izquierda
+            if (tooltipLeft < minLeft) {
+                tooltipLeft = minLeft;
+            }
+            // Constreñir para que no se salga por la derecha
+            if (tooltipLeft + tooltipWidth > maxRight) {
+                tooltipLeft = maxRight - tooltipWidth;
+            }
+            
+            // Posición de la flecha respecto al tooltip (centrada debajo del icono)
+            const iconCenter = rect.left + (rect.width / 2);

+            
+            // Mantener la flecha dentro de los bordes del tooltip
+            if (arrowOffset < 15) arrowOffset = 15;
+            if (arrowOffset > tooltipWidth - 15) arrowOffset = tooltipWidth - 15;

     const [updatingPermisosUser, setUpdatingPermisosUser] = useState<Usuario | null>(null);
 
+    const sortedUsuarios = [...usuarios].sort((a, b) => {
+        if (!sortConfig) return 0;
+        
+        const { direction } = sortConfig;
+        
+        // 1. Regla Prioritaria: ADMINISTRADOR siempre primero
+        if (a.rol === 'ADMINISTRADOR' && b.rol !== 'ADMINISTRADOR') return -1;
+        if (b.rol === 'ADMINISTRADOR' && a.rol !== 'ADMINISTRADOR') return 1;
+        
+        // 2. Orden por Rol
+        if (a.rol < b.rol) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
+        if (a.rol > b.rol) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
+        
+        // 3. Orden Secundario por nombre para estabilidad
+        return a.username.localeCompare(b.username);
+    });
+
+    const handleSort = (key: 'rol') => {
+        setSortConfig(prev => {
+            if (prev?.key === key && prev.direction === 'asc') {
+                return { key, direction: 'desc' };
+            }
+            return { key, direction: 'asc' };
+        });
+    };
+
     return (
         <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden">
             <div className="overflow-x-auto">

diff --git a/app/api/roles/[id]/route.ts b/app/api/roles/[id]/route.ts
new file mode 100644

+++ b/app/api/roles/[id]/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { checkPermission } from "@/lib/auth-utils-server";
+
+export async function PATCH(
+    req: Request,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error } = await checkPermission("usuarios:roles");
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        const { nombre, permisos } = await req.json();
+
+        // Check if it's a system role
+        const role = await query<{ is_system: number }>("SELECT is_system FROM roles WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        if (role.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Rol no encontrado" }, { status: 404 });
+
+        if (role[0].is_system && nombre) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No se puede cambiar el nombre de un rol de sistema" }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const updates = [];
+        const values = [];
+
+        if (nombre) {
+            updates.push("nombre = ?");
+            values.push(nombre);
+        }
+        if (permisos) {
+            updates.push("permisos = ?");
+            values.push(JSON.stringify(permisos));
+        }
+
+        if (updates.length > 0) {
+            values.push(id);
+            await execute(
+                `UPDATE roles SET ${updates.join(", ")} WHERE id = ?`,
+                values
+            );
+        }
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        console.error("Error updating role:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error al actualizar el rol" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+export async function DELETE(
+    req: Request,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error } = await checkPermission("usuarios:roles");
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        const role = await query<{ is_system: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT is_system, nombre FROM roles WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        if (role.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Rol no encontrado" }, { status: 404 });
+
+        if (role[0].is_system) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No se pueden eliminar roles de sistema" }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        // Check if users are using this role
+        const users = await query("SELECT id FROM usuarios WHERE rol = ?", [role[0].nombre]);
+        if (users.length > 0) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No se puede eliminar un rol que está siendo usado por usuarios" }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        await execute("DELETE FROM roles WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error deleting role:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error al eliminar el rol" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/roles/route.ts b/app/api/roles/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7481744
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/roles/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { checkPermission } from "@/lib/auth-utils-server";
+
+export async function GET() {
+    const { error } = await checkPermission("usuarios:roles");
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const roles = await query("SELECT * FROM roles ORDER BY is_system DESC, nombre ASC");
+        return NextResponse.json(roles);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error fetching roles:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error al obtener roles" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+export async function POST(req: Request) {
+    const { error } = await checkPermission("usuarios:roles");
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { nombre, permisos } = await req.json();
+
+        if (!nombre || !permisos) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Nombre y permisos son requeridos" }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO roles (nombre, permisos) VALUES (?, ?)",
+            [nombre, JSON.stringify(permisos)]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ id: Number(result.insertId), nombre, permisos });
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        if (error.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Ya existe un rol con ese nombre" }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+        console.error("Error creating role:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error al crear el rol" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

diff --git a/app/usuarios/roles/RoleConfigModal.tsx b/app/usuarios/roles/RoleConfigModal.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bf15e9a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/usuarios/roles/RoleConfigModal.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+import { Shield, Save, Check, Plus } from "lucide-react";
+
+interface Role {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    permisos: string | string[];
+    is_system?: number;
+}
+
+import { CATEGORIAS_PERMISOS } from "@/lib/permissions-config";
+
+export default function RoleConfigModal({ role, isOpen, onClose, onRefresh }: {
+    role: Role | null;
+    isOpen: boolean;
+    onClose: () => void;
+    onRefresh: () => void;
+}) {
+    const [nombre, setNombre] = useState(role?.nombre || "");
+    const [selectedPermisos, setSelectedPermisos] = useState<string[]>([]);
+    const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        if (role) {
+            setNombre(role.nombre);
+            setSelectedPermisos(typeof role.permisos === 'string' ? JSON.parse(role.permisos) : role.permisos);
+        } else {
+            setNombre("");
+            setSelectedPermisos([]);
+        }
+    }, [role, isOpen]);
+
+    const togglePermission = (id: string) => {
+        setSelectedPermisos(prev => 
+            prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(p => p !== id) : [...prev, id]
+        );
+    };
+
+    const handleSave = async () => {
+        if (!nombre) return alert("El nombre es obligatorio");
+        setIsSaving(true);
+        try {
+            const url = role ? `/api/roles/${role.id}` : "/api/roles";
+            const method = role ? "PATCH" : "POST";
+            
+            const res = await fetch(url, {
+                method,
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ nombre, permisos: selectedPermisos })
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                onRefresh();
+                onClose();
+            } else {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                alert(data.error || "Error al guardar");
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error saving role:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsSaving(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const isFullAccess = selectedPermisos.includes("*") || role?.nombre === "Administrador";
+
+    return (
+        <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} title={role ? `Editar Rol: ${role.nombre}` : "Crear Nuevo Rol"} maxWidth="max-w-4xl">
+            <div className="space-y-8">
+                {/* Nombre Input */}
+                <div className="space-y-4">
+                    <label className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Nombre del Perfil</label>
+                    <input 
+                        type="text"
+                        value={nombre}
+                        onChange={(e) => setNombre(e.target.value)}
+                        disabled={!!role?.is_system}
+                        placeholder="Ej: Perito Senior, Administrativo..."
+                        className="w-full px-6 py-4 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl text-slate-900 font-black uppercase tracking-tight focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-600 transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
+                    />
+                </div>
+
+                {/* Grid de Permisos */}
+                <div className="space-y-4">
+                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                        <label className="text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Configuración de Privilegios</label>
+                        {isFullAccess && (
+                            <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest border border-indigo-100">Acceso Total</span>
+                        )}
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
+                        {CATEGORIAS_PERMISOS.map(cat => (
+                            <div key={cat.name} className="bg-slate-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 p-6 space-y-4">
+                                <h3 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 flex items-center gap-2">
+                                    <div className="w-1 h-3 bg-indigo-600 rounded-full"></div>
+                                    {cat.name}
+                                </h3>
+                                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2">
+                                    {cat.items.map(p => (
+                                        <button
+                                            key={p.id}
+                                            disabled={isFullAccess}
+                                            onClick={() => togglePermission(p.id)}
+                                            className={`flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left ${
+                                                selectedPermisos.includes(p.id) || isFullAccess
+                                                    ? 'bg-white border-indigo-600 shadow-sm'
+                                                    : 'bg-white/50 border-slate-100 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100'
+                                            }`}
+                                        >
+                                            <span className={`text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-tight ${selectedPermisos.includes(p.id) || isFullAccess ? 'text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>
+                                                {p.label}
+                                            </span>
+                                            {(selectedPermisos.includes(p.id) || isFullAccess) && (
+                                                <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white">
+                                                    <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
+                                                </div>
+                                            )}
+                                        </button>
+                                    ))}
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                        ))}
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+
+                {/* Footer Acciones */}
+                <div className="flex gap-4 pt-4">
+                    <button 
+                        onClick={onClose}
+                        className="flex-1 py-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 rounded-2xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all shadow-sm"
+                    >
+                        Cancelar
+                    </button>
+                    <button 
+                        onClick={handleSave}
+                        disabled={isSaving}
+                        className="flex-1 py-4 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-2xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-xl shadow-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 group disabled:opacity-50"
+                    >
+                        {isSaving ? (
+                            <div className="w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white/20 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
+                        ) : (
+                            <>
+                                <Save className="w-4 h-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" />
+                                Guardar Perfil
+                            </>
+                        )}
+                    </button>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+        </Modal>
+    );

+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+import { Settings, Shield, Plus, Trash2, Edit2, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
+import RoleConfigModal from "./RoleConfigModal";
+
+interface Role {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    permisos: string;
+    is_system: number;
+}
+
+export default function RolesTable() {
+    const [roles, setRoles] = useState<Role[]>([]);
+    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+    const [configRole, setConfigRole] = useState<Role | null>(null);
+    const [isCreateModalOpen, setIsCreateModalOpen] = useState(false);
+
+    const fetchRoles = async () => {
+        setLoading(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/roles");
+            if (res.ok) {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                setRoles(data);
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error fetching roles:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        fetchRoles();
+    }, []);
+
+    const deleteRole = async (id: number) => {
+        if (!confirm("¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar este rol? Esta acción no se puede deshacer y fallará si hay usuarios asignados.")) return;
+        
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/roles/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
+            if (res.ok) {
+                fetchRoles();
+            } else {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                alert(data.error || "Error al eliminar el rol");
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error deleting role:", error);
+        }
+    };
+
+    if (loading) return <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse">Cargando Roles...</div>;
+
+    return (
+        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden">
+            <div className="p-6 border-b border-slate-50 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50">
+                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+                    <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg shadow-indigo-100">
+                        <Shield className="w-5 h-5" />
+                    </div>
+                    <div>
+                        <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-slate-900 uppercase tracking-tight">Roles del Sistema</h2>
+                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 font-semibold">Gestiona los perfiles y permisos de acceso</p>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+                <button 
+                    onClick={() => setIsCreateModalOpen(true)}
+                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-xl text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-black transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-200"
+                >
+                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
+                    Nuevo Rol
+                </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
+                    <thead>
+                        <tr className="bg-white border-b border-slate-100">
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Nombre del Rol</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">Tipo</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-right">Acciones</th>
+                        </tr>
+                    </thead>
+                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-50">
+                        {roles.map((r) => (
+                            <tr key={r.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors group">
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+                                        <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${r.is_system ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600' : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-600'}`}>
+                                            <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                        </div>
+                                        <span className="font-black text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-tight">{r.nombre}</span>
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
+                                    {r.is_system ? (
+                                        <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border border-amber-100">
+                                            Sistema
+                                        </span>
+                                    ) : (
+                                        <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 border border-slate-200">
+                                            Personalizado
+                                        </span>
+                                    )}
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4 text-right">
+                                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
+                                        <button 
+                                            onClick={() => setConfigRole(r)}
+                                            className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg transition-all"
+                                            title="Configurar Permisos"
+                                        >
+                                            <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                        </button>
+                                        {!r.is_system && (
+                                            <button 
+                                                onClick={() => deleteRole(r.id)}
+                                                className="p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-all"
+                                                title="Eliminar Rol"
+                                            >
+                                                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                            </button>
+                                        )}
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                            </tr>
+                        ))}
+                    </tbody>
+                </table>
+            </div>
+
+            {(configRole || isCreateModalOpen) && (
+                <RoleConfigModal 
+                    role={configRole}
+                    isOpen={!!configRole || isCreateModalOpen}
+                    onClose={() => {
+                        setConfigRole(null);
+                        setIsCreateModalOpen(false);
+                    }}
+                    onRefresh={fetchRoles}
+                />
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/lib/roles.server.ts b/lib/roles.server.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..fa8943b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/roles.server.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+import { query } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+/**
+ * Gets permissions for a given role from the database.
+ * Independent of NextAuth to avoid circular dependencies.
+ */
+export async function getRolePermissions(roleName: string): Promise<string[]> {
+    if (roleName === "ADMINISTRADOR") return ["*"];
+    
+    try {
+        const roles = await query<{ permisos: string }>(
+            "SELECT permisos FROM roles WHERE nombre = ?",
+            [roleName]
+        );
+        if (roles.length > 0) {
+            return JSON.parse(roles[0].permisos);
+        }
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error fetching role permissions:", error);
+    }
+    return [];
+}

+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+
+const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+    host: '127.0.0.1',
+    user: 'root',
+    password: '',
+    database: 'peritaciones',
+    connectionLimit: 1
+});
+
+async function migrate() {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        console.log('Starting migration...');
+
+        // 1. Alter usuarios table to change rol from ENUM to VARCHAR
+        console.log('Altering usuarios table...');
+        await conn.query("ALTER TABLE usuarios MODIFY COLUMN rol VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USUARIO'");
+
+        // 2. Update all roles in roles table to uppercase
+        console.log('Normalizing roles table...');
+        await conn.query("UPDATE roles SET nombre = UPPER(nombre)");
+
+        // 3. Update all roles in usuarios table to uppercase
+        console.log('Normalizing usuarios table...');
+        await conn.query("UPDATE usuarios SET rol = UPPER(rol)");
+
+        // 4. Fix empty roles (from the bug) based on previous state or defaults
+        // In the previous check, some users had empty roles because of the ENUM restriction.
+        // We'll try to recover them if possible, or set to a safe default if unknown.
+        // For 'test_browser', 'JOSE 2', 'chino', they likely intended the roles they chose in the UI.
+        // Since we don't know for sure, but we know 'Usuario' (now 'USUARIO') is the default.
+        console.log('Fixing empty roles...');
+        await conn.query("UPDATE usuarios SET rol = 'USUARIO' WHERE rol = '' OR rol IS NULL");
+
+        console.log('Migration completed successfully.');
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error('Migration failed:', err);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..dd436a5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tmp/setup_roles.js
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+
+const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+    host: '127.0.0.1',
+    user: 'root',
+    password: '',
+    database: 'peritaciones',
+    connectionLimit: 5
+});
+
+async function setupRolesTable() {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        
+        // Create table
+        await conn.query(`
+            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS roles (
+                id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+                nombre VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+                permisos TEXT NOT NULL,
+                is_system BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
+                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+            )
+        `);
+        console.log("Table 'roles' created successfully.");
+
+        // Insert default roles if they don't exist
+        const defaultRoles = [
+            {
+                nombre: 'Administrador',
+                permisos: '["*"]', // Special value for all permissions
+                is_system: true
+            },
+            {
+                nombre: 'Usuario',
+                permisos: JSON.stringify([
+                    "albaranes:ver_listado", "albaranes:crear", "albaranes:editar", "albaranes:borrar",
+                    "albaranes:ver:datos_cliente", "albaranes:ver:importes", "albaranes:editar:importes",
+                    "albaranes:ver:fotos", "albaranes:ver:diario",
+                    "talleres:ver_listado", "talleres:crear", "talleres:editar", "talleres:borrar",
+                    "peritos:ver_listado", "peritos:crear", "peritos:editar", "peritos:borrar",
+                    "aseguradoras:ver_listado", "aseguradoras:crear", "aseguradoras:editar", "aseguradoras:borrar",
+                    "marcas:ver_listado", "marcas:crear", "marcas:editar", "marcas:borrar",
+                    "modelos:ver_listado", "modelos:crear", "modelos:editar", "modelos:borrar",
+                    "gastos:ver_listado", "gastos:crear", "gastos:editar", "gastos:borrar", "gastos:ver:importes",
+                    "proveedores:ver_listado", "proveedores:crear", "proveedores:editar", "proveedores:borrar"
+                ]),
+                is_system: true
+            },
+            {
+                nombre: 'Invitado',
+                permisos: JSON.stringify([
+                    "albaranes:ver_listado", "albaranes:ver:datos_cliente", "albaranes:ver:importes",
+                    "albaranes:ver:fotos", "albaranes:ver:diario",
+                    "talleres:ver_listado", "peritos:ver_listado", "aseguradoras:ver_listado",
+                    "marcas:ver_listado", "modelos:ver_listado", "gastos:ver_listado",
+                    "gastos:ver:importes", "proveedores:ver_listado"
+                ]),
+                is_system: true
+            }
+        ];
+
+        for (const role of defaultRoles) {
+            await conn.query(
+                "INSERT IGNORE INTO roles (nombre, permisos, is_system) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
+                [role.nombre, role.permisos, role.is_system]
+            );
+        }
+        console.log("Default roles inserted.");
+
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error(err);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+setupRolesTable();

+    request: NextRequest,

+) {

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { checkPermission } from "@/lib/auth-utils-server";
+
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        const { error } = await checkPermission("peritos:borrar");
+        if (error) return error;
+
+        await execute("DELETE FROM peritos WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Perito eliminado con éxito." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al borrar perito:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

diff --git a/app/peritos/page.tsx b/app/peritos/page.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..94b05cb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/peritos/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,109 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { ShieldCheck, UserCog, RefreshCw, Plus, Edit, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
+import { useSession } from "next-auth/react";
+import { hasPermission } from "@/lib/auth-utils-client";
+
+export default function PeritosPage() {
+    const { data: session } = useSession();
+    const [peritos, setPeritos] = useState<any[]>([]);
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+
+    const isAdmin = (session?.user as any)?.rol === "Administrador";
+    const canView = isAdmin || (session?.user as any)?.permisos?.includes("peritos:ver_listado");
+
+    const fetchPeritos = async () => {
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/peritos");
+            const data = await res.json();
+            if (Array.isArray(data)) setPeritos(data);
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error(error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        if (canView) fetchPeritos();
+    }, [canView]);
+
+    if (!session) return null;
+
+    if (!canView) {
+        return (
+            <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo">
+                <Navbar />
+                <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-20 text-center">
+                    <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 uppercase tracking-tighter">Acceso Denegado</h1>
+                    <p className="text-slate-500 mt-4">No tienes permisos para visualizar este maestro.</p>
+                </main>
+            </div>
+        );
+    }
+
+    return (
+        <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo">
+            <Navbar />
+            <main className="p-4 sm:p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto space-y-8 animate-in fade-in duration-700">
+                <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-6 pb-6 border-b border-slate-200">
+                    <div className="space-y-2">
+                        <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-slate-900 text-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">
+                            <ShieldCheck className="w-3 h-3" /> Maestros
+                        </div>
+                        <h1 className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight uppercase flex items-center gap-4">
+                            <UserCog className="w-10 h-10 text-verde-principal" />
+                            Listado de Peritos
+                        </h1>
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+                        <button onClick={fetchPeritos} className="p-2.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg transition-all">
+                            <RefreshCw className={`w-5 h-5 ${isLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
+                        </button>
+                        {(isAdmin || hasPermission(session, "peritos:crear")) && (
+                            <button className="bg-verde-principal text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg shadow-verde-principal/20 transition-all hover:bg-verde-oscuro">
+                                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Nuevo Perito
+                            </button>
+                        )}
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden">
+                    <table className="w-full text-left">
+                        <thead className="bg-slate-900 text-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">
+                            <tr>
+                                <th className="px-6 py-4">Nombre</th>
+                                <th className="px-6 py-4">Apellidos</th>
+                                <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Acciones</th>
+                            </tr>
+                        </thead>
+                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-50">
+                            {peritos.map(p => (
+                                <tr key={p.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors">
+                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 font-bold text-slate-700">{p.nombre}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-slate-500">{p.apellidos}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-right space-x-2">
+                                        {(isAdmin || hasPermission(session, "peritos:editar")) && (
+                                            <button className="p-2 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-all">
+                                                <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                            </button>
+                                        )}
+                                        {(isAdmin || hasPermission(session, "peritos:borrar")) && (
+                                            <button className="p-2 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-all">
+                                                <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                            </button>
+                                        )}
+                                    </td>
+                                </tr>
+                            ))}
+                        </tbody>
+                    </table>
+                </div>
+            </main>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+import { Shield, Check, X, Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
+
+interface PermisoItem {
+    id: string;
+    label: string;
+    description?: string;
+}
+
+interface PermisosCategoria {
+    label: string;
+    permisos: PermisoItem[];
+}
+
+const CATEGORIAS_PERMISOS: PermisosCategoria[] = [
+    {
+        label: "Albaranes",
+        permisos: [
+            { id: "albaranes:ver_listado", label: "Ver Listado de Albaranes" },
+            { id: "albaranes:crear", label: "Crear Nuevos Albaranes" },
+            { id: "albaranes:editar", label: "Editar Albaranes Existentes" },
+            { id: "albaranes:borrar", label: "Borrar Albaranes (Admin)" },
+            { id: "albaranes:ver:datos_cliente", label: "Ver Datos del Cliente" },
+            { id: "albaranes:ver:importes", label: "Ver Importes Económicos" },
+            { id: "albaranes:editar:importes", label: "Editar Importes Económicos" },
+            { id: "albaranes:ver:fotos", label: "Ver Pestaña de Fotos" },
+            { id: "albaranes:ver:diario", label: "Ver Pestaña de Diario" },
+        ]
+    },
+    {
+        label: "Gastos (Contabilidad)",
+        permisos: [
+            { id: "gastos:ver_listado", label: "Ver Listado de Gastos" },
+            { id: "gastos:crear", label: "Crear Gastos" },
+            { id: "gastos:editar", label: "Editar Gastos" },
+            { id: "gastos:borrar", label: "Borrar Gastos" },
+            { id: "gastos:ver:importes", label: "Ver Desglose de Importes" },
+        ]
+    },
+    {
+        label: "Configuración y Maestros",
+        permisos: [
+            { id: "config:aseguradoras:gestionar", label: "Gestionar Aseguradoras" },
+            { id: "config:talleres:gestionar", label: "Gestionar Talleres" },
+            { id: "config:peritos:gestionar", label: "Gestionar Peritos" },
+            { id: "config:marcas_modelos:gestionar", label: "Gestionar Marcas y Modelos" },
+        ]
+    },
+    {
+        label: "Administración",
+        permisos: [
+            { id: "usuarios:ver", label: "Ver Otros Usuarios" },
+            { id: "usuarios:crear", label: "Crear Usuarios" },
+            { id: "usuarios:permisos", label: "Gestionar Permisos de Otros" },
+            { id: "diario:ver", label: "Ver Diario Global" },
+            { id: "stats:ver", label: "Ver Estadísticas y Dashboard" },
+        ]
+    }
+];
+
+interface PermisosModalProps {
+    usuario: { id: number; username: string; permisos: string[] | string };
+    isOpen: boolean;
+    onClose: () => void;
+    onRefresh: () => void;
+}
+
+export default function PermisosModal({ usuario, isOpen, onClose, onRefresh }: PermisosModalProps) {
+    // Asegurar que permisos sea un array de strings de forma robusta
+    const getInitialPermisos = (): string[] => {
+        let raw = usuario.permisos;
+        if (!raw) return [];
+
+        try {
+            // Intentar parsear si es un string (e incluso si es un string que contiene otro string JSON)
+            while (typeof raw === 'string' && (raw.startsWith('[') || raw.startsWith('"'))) {
+                const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
+                if (parsed === raw) break; // Evitar bucles infinitos
+                raw = parsed;
+            }
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.error("[DEBUG] Error parsing permisos:", e);
+        }
+
+        if (Array.isArray(raw)) {
+            return raw.map(p => String(p).trim());
+        }
+        return [];
+    };
+
+    const initialPermisos = getInitialPermisos();
+        
+    console.log("[DEBUG] PermisosModal - usuario.id:", usuario.id);
+    console.log("[DEBUG] PermisosModal - raw permisos type:", typeof usuario.permisos);
+    console.log("[DEBUG] PermisosModal - normalized initialPermisos:", initialPermisos);
+        
+    const [permisos, setPermisos] = useState<string[]>(initialPermisos);
+    const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        if (isOpen) {
+            setPermisos(getInitialPermisos());
+        }
+    }, [isOpen, usuario.permisos]);
+
+    const togglePermiso = (id: string) => {
+        setPermisos(prev => 
+            prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(p => p !== id) : [...prev, id]
+        );
+    };
+
+    const handleSave = async () => {
+        setIsSaving(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/usuarios/${usuario.id}`, {
+                method: "PATCH",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ permisos }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                onRefresh();
+                onClose();
+            } else {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                alert(data.error || "Error al guardar permisos");
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error saving permissions:", error);
+            alert("Error de conexión");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSaving(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <Modal 
+            isOpen={isOpen} 
+            onClose={onClose} 
+            title={`Permisos de: ${usuario.username}`} 
+            maxWidth="max-w-4xl"
+        >
+            <div className="flex flex-col h-[600px]">
+                <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-2 space-y-6">
+                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-100 italic">
+                        Nota: Los usuarios con rol "Administrador" tienen todos los permisos habilitados por defecto, independientemente de esta configuración.
+                    </p>
+                    
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
+                        {CATEGORIAS_PERMISOS.map((cat, idx) => (
+                            <div key={idx} className="space-y-3">
+                                <h3 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-verde-principal tracking-tighter border-b border-verde-principal/20 pb-1.5 flex items-center gap-2">
+                                    <Shield className="w-3 h-3" />
+                                    {cat.label}
+                                </h3>
+                                <div className="space-y-2">
+                                    {cat.permisos.map((p) => {
+                                        const isActive = permisos.includes(p.id);
+                                        return (
+                                            <div 
+                                                key={p.id} 
+                                                onClick={() => togglePermiso(p.id)}
+                                                className={`flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all cursor-pointer select-none group ${
+                                                    isActive 
+                                                    ? 'bg-verde-claro/10 border-verde-principal/30' 
+                                                    : 'bg-white border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50'
+                                                }`}
+                                            >
+                                                <div className="flex flex-col">
+                                                    <span className={`text-xs font-bold transition-all ${isActive ? 'text-verde-principal' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
+                                                        {p.label}
+                                                    </span>
+                                                    <span className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-mono">
+                                                        {p.id}
+                                                    </span>
+                                                </div>
+                                                <div className={`w-10 h-5 rounded-full relative transition-all duration-300 ${
+                                                    isActive ? 'bg-verde-principal' : 'bg-gray-200'
+                                                }`}>
+                                                    <div className={`absolute top-1 w-3 h-3 bg-white rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
+                                                        isActive ? 'left-6' : 'left-1'
+                                                    }`} />
+                                                </div>
+                                            </div>
+                                        );
+                                    })}
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                        ))}
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-6 mt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
+                    <button 
+                        onClick={onClose} 
+                        className="px-6 py-2.5 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-all"
+                    >
+                        Cancelar
+                    </button>
+                    <button 
+                        onClick={handleSave} 
+                        disabled={isSaving}
+                        className="px-8 py-2.5 bg-verde-principal hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-verde-principal/20 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"
+                    >
+                        {isSaving ? (
+                            <>
+                                <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
+                                Guardando...
+                            </>
+                        ) : (
+                            <>
+                                <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
+                                Guardar Permisos
+                            </>
+                        )}
+                    </button>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+        </Modal>
+    );
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+
+const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+    host: '127.0.0.1',
+    port: 3306,
+    user: 'root',
+    password: '',
+    database: 'peritaciones',
+    connectionLimit: 5
+});
+
+async function check() {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        const users = await conn.query("SELECT id, username, rol, permisos FROM usuarios");
+        console.log("Users in DB:");
+        users.forEach(u => {
+            console.log(`- ${u.username} (${u.rol}): ${u.permisos}`);
+        });
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error(err);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.end();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+check();
diff --git a/lib/auth-utils-client.ts b/lib/auth-utils-client.ts
new file mode 100644

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+/**
+ * Client-side helper (can be used in client components via session)
+ * Do NOT import server-only modules like "@/auth" here.
+ */
+export function hasPermission(session: any, permission: string) {
+    if (!session?.user) return false;
+    if (session.user.rol === "Administrador") return true;
+    const permisos = (session.user as any).permisos as string[] || [];
+    return permisos.includes(permission);
+}

+import { auth } from "@/auth";
 import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
 
 export type Role = "Administrador" | "Usuario" | "Invitado";
 
 /**
  * Checks if the current user has the required role.
- * Returns the session if authorized, or a NextResponse error if not.
+ * Server-side only.
  */
 export async function checkRole(requiredRoles: Role[]) {
     const session = await auth();
@@ -29,7 +28,28 @@ export async function checkRole(requiredRoles: Role[]) {
 }
 
 /**
- * Common protection patterns
+ * Checks if the current user has a specific permission or is an Administrador.
+ * Server-side only.
  */
+export async function checkPermission(permission: string) {
+    const session = await auth();
+    
+    if (!session?.user) {
+        return { error: NextResponse.json({ error: "No autenticado" }, { status: 401 }), session: null };
+    }
+
+    const isAdmin = (session.user as any).rol === "Administrador";
+    const permisos = (session.user as any).permisos as string[] || [];
+
+    if (!isAdmin && !permisos.includes(permission)) {
+        return { 
+            error: NextResponse.json({ error: `No tienes el permiso necesario: ${permission}` }, { status: 403 }), 
+            session 
+        };
+    }
+
+    return { error: null, session };
+}
+
 export const isNotGuest = () => checkRole(["Administrador", "Usuario"]);
 export const isAdmin = () => checkRole(["Administrador"]);
diff --git a/migrate-permissions.js b/migrate-permissions.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4f3237d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/migrate-permissions.js
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+
+// Hardcoded for the migration script to avoid dependency issues with dotenv
+const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+    host: '127.0.0.1',
+    port: 3306,
+    user: 'root',
+    password: '',
+    database: 'peritaciones',
+    connectionLimit: 5
+});
+
+const defaultPermissions = {
+    "Usuario": [
+        "albaranes:ver_listado", "albaranes:crear", "albaranes:editar", 
+        "albaranes:ver:datos_cliente", "albaranes:ver:datos_vehiculo", "albaranes:ver:importes", 
+        "albaranes:ver:fotos", "albaranes:ver:diario", "albaranes:ver:perito", 
+        "gastos:ver_listado", "gastos:crear", "gastos:ver:importes", "diario:ver"
+    ],
+    "Invitado": [
+        "albaranes:ver_listado", "albaranes:ver:datos_cliente", "albaranes:ver:datos_vehiculo", 
+        "albaranes:ver:importes", "albaranes:ver:fotos", "albaranes:ver:diario", 
+        "gastos:ver_listado", "gastos:ver:importes"
+    ]
+};
+
+async function migrate() {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        console.log("Connected to database.");
+
+        const users = await conn.query("SELECT id, username, rol FROM usuarios WHERE rol IN ('Usuario', 'Invitado')");
+        console.log(`Found ${users.length} users to migrate.`);
+
+        for (const user of users) {
+            const permisos = defaultPermissions[user.rol] || [];
+            await conn.query("UPDATE usuarios SET permisos = ? WHERE id = ?", [JSON.stringify(permisos), user.id]);
+            console.log(`Updated permissions for user: ${user.username} (${user.rol})`);
+        }
+
+        console.log("Migration completed successfully.");
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error("Migration failed:", err);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.end();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();

+/** DELETE /api/usuarios/[id] — Borra un usuario (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error, session } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        
+        const targetUser = await query("SELECT rol FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        if (targetUser.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Usuario no encontrado" }, { status: 404 });
+        
+        // REGLA: No puedes borrar a otro administrador ni a ti mismo desde aquí para mayor seguridad
+        const isTargetAdmin = targetUser[0].rol === "Administrador";
+        const isSelf = session?.user?.id === id.toString();
+
+        if (isSelf) return NextResponse.json({ error: "No puedes borrarte a ti mismo." }, { status: 403 });
+        if (isTargetAdmin) return NextResponse.json({ error: "No puedes eliminar a otro administrador." }, { status: 403 });
+
+        await execute("DELETE FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Usuario eliminado." });
     } catch (error) {
-        console.error("Error al actualizar usuario:", error);
-        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+        console.error("Error al borrar usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno al borrar usuario." }, { status: 500 });
     }
 }

+    const handleDelete = async (id: number, username: string) => {
+        if (username === 'admin') return;
+        if (!confirm(`¿Estás seguro de que deseas eliminar al usuario "${username}"?`)) return;
+        
+        setIsUpdating(id);

+            const res = await fetch(`/api/usuarios/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
+            if (res.ok) {
+                onRefresh();

+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error deleting user:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsUpdating(null);

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..cd73f0e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/types/next-auth.d.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+import NextAuth, { DefaultSession } from "next-auth"
+
+declare module "next-auth" {
+  interface Session {
+    user: {
+      id: string
+      rol: "Administrador" | "Usuario" | "Invitado"
+      activo: number
+    } & DefaultSession["user"]
+  }
+
+  interface User {
+    rol: "Administrador" | "Usuario" | "Invitado"
+    activo: number
+  }
+}
+
+declare module "next-auth/jwt" {
+  interface JWT {
+    id: string
+    rol: "Administrador" | "Usuario" | "Invitado"
+    activo: number
+  }
+}

+
+/** DELETE /api/albaranes/[id] — Borra un albarán (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        
+        // El Administrador puede borrar cualquier albarán
+        await execute("DELETE FROM albaranes WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Albarán eliminado con éxito." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al borrar albarán:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno al borrar el albarán." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

diff --git a/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts b/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..fcb5886
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { isAdmin } from "@/lib/auth-utils";
+
+/** PUT /api/usuarios/[id] — Actualiza un usuario (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function PUT(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error, session } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        const { username, password, rol } = await request.json();
+        
+        // Regla: un administrador nunca podrá quitar los permisos de administrador a otro administrador
+        // Primero, comprobamos si el usuario que estamos editando es administrador
+        const targetUser = await query("SELECT rol FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        if (targetUser.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Usuario no encontrado" }, { status: 404 });
+        
+        const isTargetAdmin = targetUser[0].rol === "Administrador";
+        const isSelf = session?.user?.id === id;
+
+        // Si el objetivo es admin y queremos cambiar su rol a otra cosa
+        if (isTargetAdmin && rol !== "Administrador" && !isSelf) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No puedes degradar a otro administrador." }, { status: 403 });
+        }
+
+        let sql = "UPDATE usuarios SET username = ?, rol = ?";
+        let vals = [username, rol, id];
+        
+        if (password) {
+            sql = "UPDATE usuarios SET username = ?, password = ?, rol = ?";
+            vals = [username, password, rol, id];
+        }
+        
+        await execute(sql + " WHERE id = ?", vals);
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Usuario actualizado." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al actualizar usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** DELETE /api/usuarios/[id] — Borra un usuario (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { error, session } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        
+        // Regla: no puedes borrarte a ti mismo (opcional pero recomendado) 
+        // y no puedes borrar a otros administradores si son el "admin" principal o similar?
+        // El requisito dice: "un administrador nunca podrá quitar los permisos de administrador a otro administrador"
+        // Borrarlo es quitarle permisos de forma definitiva.
+        
+        const targetUser = await query("SELECT rol FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        if (targetUser.length === 0) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Usuario no encontrado" }, { status: 404 });
+        
+        if (targetUser[0].rol === "Administrador" && session?.user?.id !== id) {
+             return NextResponse.json({ error: "No puedes eliminar a otro administrador." }, { status: 403 });
+        }
+
+        await execute("DELETE FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Usuario eliminado." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al borrar usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/usuarios/route.ts b/app/api/usuarios/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..27c9aca
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/usuarios/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { isAdmin } from "@/lib/auth-utils";
+
+/** GET /api/usuarios — Lista todos los usuarios (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function GET() {
+    const { error } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT id, username, rol FROM usuarios ORDER BY username");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener usuarios:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/usuarios — Crea un nuevo usuario (Solo Administrador) */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    const { error } = await isAdmin();
+    if (error) return error;
+
+    try {
+        const { username, password, rol } = await request.json();
+        
+        if (!username || !password || !rol) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Faltan campos obligatorios." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        // En una app real, deberíamos hashear la contraseña. 
+        // Viendo el código de auth.ts, parece que comparas contraseñas directamente (lo cual es inseguro pero mantengo consistencia con el proyecto actual).
+        
+        await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO usuarios (username, password, rol) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
+            [username, password, rol]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Usuario creado con éxito." }, { status: 201 });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno o el usuario ya existe." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

diff --git a/app/usuarios/page.tsx b/app/usuarios/page.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d5b9e58
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/usuarios/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,233 @@
+
+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+import { useSession } from "next-auth/react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+
+export default function UsuariosPage() {
+    const { data: session, status } = useSession();
+    const router = useRouter();
+    const [usuarios, setUsuarios] = useState<any[]>([]);
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+    const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
+    
+    // Formulario para nuevo/editar
+    const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
+    const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<any>(null);
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        username: "",
+        password: "",
+        rol: "Invitado"
+    });
+
+    const userRole = (session?.user as any)?.rol;
+    const isAdmin = userRole === "Administrador";
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        if (status === "unauthenticated" || (status === "authenticated" && !isAdmin)) {
+            router.push("/");
+        } else if (status === "authenticated" && isAdmin) {
+            fetchUsuarios();
+        }
+    }, [status, isAdmin]);
+
+    const fetchUsuarios = async () => {
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/usuarios");
+            if (res.ok) {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                setUsuarios(data);
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSaving(true);
+        const url = editingUser ? `/api/usuarios/${editingUser.id}` : "/api/usuarios";
+        const method = editingUser ? "PUT" : "POST";
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(url, {
+                method,
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(formData)
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                alert(editingUser ? "Usuario actualizado" : "Usuario creado");
+                setShowModal(false);
+                fetchUsuarios();
+            } else {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                alert(data.error || "Error al guardar");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            alert("Error de conexión");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSaving(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleDelete = async (id: number, rol: string) => {
+        if (rol === "Administrador" && session?.user?.id !== id.toString()) {
+            alert("No puedes eliminar a otro administrador.");
+            return;
+        }
+
+        if (!confirm("¿De verdad quieres eliminar este usuario?")) return;
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/usuarios/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
+            if (res.ok) {
+                fetchUsuarios();
+            } else {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                alert(data.error || "Error al eliminar");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            alert("Error de conexión");
+        }
+    };
+
+    if (status === "loading" || isLoading) {
+        return <div className="p-8 text-center font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse">Cargando Usuarios...</div>;
+    }
+
+    return (
+        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto p-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
+            <div className="flex justify-between items-end mb-8">
+                <div>
+                    <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-verde-principal uppercase tracking-tighter">Gestión de Usuarios</h1>
+                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase mt-1">Panel de Control de Accesos y Roles</p>
+                </div>
+                <button 
+                    onClick={() => {
+                        setEditingUser(null);
+                        setFormData({ username: "", password: "", rol: "Invitado" });
+                        setShowModal(true);
+                    }}
+                    className="bg-verde-principal hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[10px] shadow-lg shadow-verde-principal/20 transition-all transform active:scale-95"
+                >
+                    + Nuevo Usuario
+                </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-xl overflow-hidden">
+                <table className="w-full text-left text-sm border-collapse">
+                    <thead>
+                        <tr className="bg-gray-50 text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 border-b border-gray-100">
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4">Usuario</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4">Rol Actual</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right">Acciones</th>
+                        </tr>
+                    </thead>
+                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
+                        {usuarios.map(u => (
+                            <tr key={u.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4 font-bold text-gray-700">{u.username}</td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase ${
+                                        u.rol === 'Administrador' ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-600' :
+                                        u.rol === 'Usuario' ? 'bg-verde-claro text-verde-oscuro' :
+                                        'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'
+                                    }`}>
+                                        {u.rol}
+                                    </span>
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4 text-right">
+                                    <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
+                                        <button 
+                                            onClick={() => {
+                                                setEditingUser(u);
+                                                setFormData({ username: u.username, password: "", rol: u.rol });
+                                                setShowModal(true);
+                                            }}
+                                            className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl text-gray-400 hover:text-verde-enfasis hover:shadow-sm border border-transparent hover:border-gray-100 transition-all"
+                                        >
+                                            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15.232 5.232l3.536 3.536m-2.036-5.036a2.5 2.5 0 113.536 3.536L6.5 21.036H3v-3.572L16.732 3.732z" /></svg>
+                                        </button>
+                                        <button 
+                                            onClick={() => handleDelete(u.id, u.rol)}
+                                            className="p-2 hover:bg-white rounded-xl text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:shadow-sm border border-transparent hover:border-gray-100 transition-all"
+                                        >
+                                            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16" /></svg>
+                                        </button>
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                            </tr>
+                        ))}
+                    </tbody>
+                </table>
+            </div>
+
+            {/* Modal */}
+            {showModal && (
+                <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/60 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
+                    <div className="bg-white max-w-md w-full rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-300">
+                        <div className="bg-verde-principal p-6 text-white text-center">
+                            <h2 className="text-xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight">{editingUser ? "Editar Usuario" : "Nuevo Usuario"}</h2>
+                        </div>
+                        <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="p-8 space-y-4">
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 mb-1 ml-1">Nombre de Usuario:</label>
+                                <input 
+                                    type="text" 
+                                    value={formData.username}
+                                    onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, username: e.target.value})}
+                                    className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-2 border-transparent focus:border-verde-principal focus:bg-white rounded-xl text-gray-700 font-bold transition-all outline-none"
+                                    required
+                                />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 mb-1 ml-1">
+                                    {editingUser ? "Nueva Contraseña (dejar en blanco para no cambiar):" : "Contraseña:"}
+                                </label>
+                                <input 
+                                    type="password" 
+                                    value={formData.password}
+                                    onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, password: e.target.value})}
+                                    className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-2 border-transparent focus:border-verde-principal focus:bg-white rounded-xl text-gray-700 font-bold transition-all outline-none"
+                                    required={!editingUser}
+                                />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 mb-1 ml-1">Rol:</label>
+                                <select 
+                                    value={formData.rol}
+                                    onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, rol: e.target.value})}
+                                    className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-2 border-transparent focus:border-verde-principal focus:bg-white rounded-xl text-gray-700 font-bold transition-all outline-none"
+                                >
+                                    <option value="Administrador">Administrador</option>
+                                    <option value="Usuario">Usuario</option>
+                                    <option value="Invitado">Invitado</option>
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="flex gap-4 pt-4">
+                                <button 
+                                    type="button" 
+                                    onClick={() => setShowModal(false)}
+                                    className="flex-1 px-4 py-4 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-500 text-[10px] font-black uppercase rounded-2xl transition-all"
+                                >
+                                    Cancelar
+                                </button>
+                                <button 
+                                    type="submit" 
+                                    disabled={isSaving}
+                                    className="flex-1 px-4 py-4 bg-verde-principal hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase rounded-2xl shadow-lg transition-all transform active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50"
+                                >
+                                    {isSaving ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar"}
+                                </button>
+                            </div>
+                        </form>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/lib/auth-utils.ts b/lib/auth-utils.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c5acf2b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/auth-utils.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+
+import { auth } from "@/auth";
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+
+export type Role = "Administrador" | "Usuario" | "Invitado";
+
+/**
+ * Checks if the current user has the required role.
+ * Returns the session if authorized, or a NextResponse error if not.
+ */
+export async function checkRole(requiredRoles: Role[]) {
+    const session = await auth();
+    
+    if (!session?.user) {
+        return { error: NextResponse.json({ error: "No autenticado" }, { status: 401 }), session: null };
+    }
+
+    const userRole = (session.user as any).rol as Role;
+
+    if (!requiredRoles.includes(userRole)) {
+        return { 
+            error: NextResponse.json({ error: "No tienes permisos suficientes para esta acción" }, { status: 403 }), 
+            session 
+        };
+    }
+
+    return { error: null, session };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Common protection patterns
+ */
+export const isNotGuest = () => checkRole(["Administrador", "Usuario"]);
+export const isAdmin = () => checkRole(["Administrador"]);
diff --git a/migrate_roles.js b/migrate_roles.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6d01525
--- /dev/null
+++ b/migrate_roles.js
@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+
+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+const fs = require('fs');
+const path = require('path');
+
+function getEnv() {
+    const envPath = path.join(process.cwd(), '.env.local');
+    if (!fs.existsSync(envPath)) return {};
+    const content = fs.readFileSync(envPath, 'utf8');
+    const env = {};
+    content.split('\n').forEach(line => {
+        const parts = line.split('=');
+        if (parts.length >= 2) {
+            env[parts[0].trim()] = parts.slice(1).join('=').trim();
+        }
+    });
+    return env;
+}
+
+async function migrate() {
+    const env = getEnv();
+    const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+        host: env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
+        user: env.DB_USER || 'root',
+        password: env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
+        database: env.DB_NAME || 'peritaciones',
+        port: Number(env.DB_PORT) || 3306,
+        connectionLimit: 5
+    });
+
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        console.log('Adding "rol" column to usuarios table...');
+        
+        // 1. Añadir la columna rol
+        try {
+            await conn.query(`
+                ALTER TABLE usuarios 
+                ADD COLUMN rol ENUM('Administrador', 'Usuario', 'Invitado') 
+                NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Usuario' AFTER email
+            `);
+            console.log('Column "rol" added successfully.');
+        } catch (e) {
+            if (e.message.includes('Duplicate column name')) {
+                console.log('Column "rol" already exists.');
+            } else {
+                throw e;
+            }
+        }
+
+        // 2. Asegurar que el usuario 'admin' es Administrador
+        await conn.query("UPDATE usuarios SET rol = 'Administrador' WHERE username = 'admin'");
+        console.log('Admin user updated to "Administrador" role.');
+
+        // 3. Verificar resultados
+        const users = await conn.query('SELECT username, rol FROM usuarios');
+        console.log('Final user roles:', JSON.stringify(users, null, 2));
+
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error('Migration failed:', err.message);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();

+const mariadb = require('mariadb');
+const fs = require('fs');
+const path = require('path');
+
+function getEnv() {
+    const envPath = path.join(process.cwd(), '.env.local');
+    if (!fs.existsSync(envPath)) return {};
+    const content = fs.readFileSync(envPath, 'utf8');
+    const env = {};
+    content.split('\n').forEach(line => {
+        const parts = line.split('=');
+        if (parts.length >= 2) {
+            env[parts[0].trim()] = parts.slice(1).join('=').trim();
+        }
+    });
+    return env;
+}
+
+async function checkSchema() {
+    const env = getEnv();
+    const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+        host: env.DB_HOST || 'localhost',
+        user: env.DB_USER || 'root',
+        password: env.DB_PASSWORD || '',
+        database: env.DB_NAME || 'peritaciones',
+        port: Number(env.DB_PORT) || 3306,
+        connectionLimit: 5
+    });
+
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        const rows = await conn.query('DESCRIBE usuarios');
+        console.log('Schema for usuarios:', JSON.stringify(rows, null, 2));
+        
+        try {
+            const users = await conn.query('SELECT username, rol FROM usuarios');
+            console.log('Current users and roles:', JSON.stringify(users, null, 2));
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log('Column "rol" probably missing:', e.message);
+        }
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error('Error:', err.message);
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+        pool.end();
+    }
+}
+
+checkSchema();

diff --git a/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts b/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1e5ec83
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/usuarios/[id]/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+/** PATCH /api/usuarios/[id] — Actualiza un usuario (activo o rol) */
+export async function PATCH(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    try {
+        const { id } = await params;
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { activo, rol } = body;
+
+        if (activo === undefined && rol === undefined) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No hay campos para actualizar." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const updates: string[] = [];
+        const values: any[] = [];
+
+        if (activo !== undefined) {
+            updates.push("activo = ?");
+            values.push(activo ? 1 : 0);
+        }
+
+        if (rol !== undefined) {
+            updates.push("rol = ?");
+            values.push(rol);
+        }
+
+        values.push(id);
+
+        await execute(
+            `UPDATE usuarios SET ${updates.join(", ")} WHERE id = ?`,
+            values
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Usuario actualizado." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al actualizar usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/usuarios/route.ts b/app/api/usuarios/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ec72b99
