+++ b/app/api/usuarios/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
+
+/** GET /api/usuarios — Lista todos los usuarios */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        // En un caso real, aquí comprobaríamos si el usuario es ADMIN
+        // Pero por petición del usuario, por ahora está abierto.
+        const rows = await query("SELECT id, username, email, rol, activo, created_at FROM usuarios ORDER BY username");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener usuarios:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/usuarios — Crea un nuevo usuario */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { username, password, email, rol } = body;
+
+        if (!username || !password) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Usuario y contraseña son obligatorios." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        // Verificar si ya existe
+        const existing = await query("SELECT id FROM usuarios WHERE username = ? LIMIT 1", [username]);
+        if (existing.length > 0) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "El nombre de usuario ya está en uso." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        // Encriptar contraseña
+        const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO usuarios (username, password, email, rol, activo) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
+            [username, hashedPassword, email || null, rol || 'PERITO', 1] // Por defecto activos al crearlos desde aquí? O 0 hasta validar?
+            // El usuario dijo "crear y validar", así que tal vez mejor empezar en 0 o 1.
+            // Pongamos 1 por defecto para facilitar, pero el admin puede desactivarlos.
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Usuario creado correctamente.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear usuario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno al crear usuario." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+interface NuevoUsuarioFormProps {
+    onSuccess: () => void;
+}
+
+export default function NuevoUsuarioForm({ onSuccess }: NuevoUsuarioFormProps) {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
+    const [error, setError] = useState("");
+
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        username: "",
+        password: "",
+        email: "",
+        rol: "PERITO"
+    });
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        setError("");
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/usuarios", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(formData),
+            });
+
+            const data = await res.json();
+
+            if (!res.ok) {
+                throw new Error(data.error || "Error al crear el usuario");
+            }
+
+            setIsOpen(false);
+            setFormData({ username: "", password: "", email: "", rol: "PERITO" });
+            onSuccess();
+        } catch (err: any) {
+            setError(err.message);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-6 rounded-lg transition-all shadow-md active:scale-95 flex items-center gap-2 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest"
+            >
+                <span>+</span> NUEVO USUARIO
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal
+                isOpen={isOpen}
+                onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                title="Crear Nuevo Usuario"
+                maxWidth="max-w-md"
+            >
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-5 p-1">
+                    {error && (
+                        <div className="bg-red-50 border-l-4 border-red-500 text-red-700 p-3 text-sm rounded">
+                            {error}
+                        </div>
+                    )}
+
+                    <div className="space-y-1">
+                        <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">
+                            Nombre de Usuario
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="text"
+                            required
+                            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 outline-none transition-all"
+                            value={formData.username}
+                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, username: e.target.value })}
+                            placeholder="ej: jlopez"
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="space-y-1">
+                        <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">
+                            Contraseña
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="password"
+                            required
+                            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 outline-none transition-all"
+                            value={formData.password}
+                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, password: e.target.value })}
+                            placeholder="••••••••"
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="space-y-1">
+                        <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">
+                            Email
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="email"
+                            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 outline-none transition-all"
+                            value={formData.email}
+                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })}
+                            placeholder="ej: usuario@peritaciones.es"
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="space-y-1">
+                        <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest block">
+                            Rol
+                        </label>
+                        <select
+                            className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 outline-none transition-all appearance-none"
+                            value={formData.rol}
+                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, rol: e.target.value })}
+                        >
+                            <option value="PERITO">PERITO</option>
+                            <option value="ADMIN">ADMINISTRADOR</option>
+                        </select>
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100">
+                        <button
+                            type="button"
+                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                            className="px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800 transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest"
+                        >
+                            Cancelar
+                        </button>
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isLoading}
+                            className="px-8 py-2.5 bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-lg shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 uppercase tracking-widest"
+                        >
+                            {isLoading ? "Guardando..." : "Crear Usuario"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );

diff --git a/app/usuarios/UsuariosTable.tsx b/app/usuarios/UsuariosTable.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7d093dd

+++ b/app/usuarios/UsuariosTable.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,139 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { CheckCircle, XCircle, User, Shield } from "lucide-react";
+import { useState } from "react";
+
+interface Usuario {
+    id: number;
+    username: string;
+    email: string | null;
+    rol: string;
+    activo: number;
+    created_at: string;
+}
+
+interface UsuariosTableProps {
+    usuarios: Usuario[];
+    onRefresh: () => void;
+}
+
+export default function UsuariosTable({ usuarios, onRefresh }: UsuariosTableProps) {
+    const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating] = useState<number | null>(null);
+
+    const toggleActivo = async (id: number, currentStatus: number) => {
+        setIsUpdating(id);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/usuarios/${id}`, {
+                method: "PATCH",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ activo: currentStatus === 1 ? 0 : 1 }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                onRefresh();
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error toggling user status:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsUpdating(null);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const changeRol = async (id: number, currentRol: string) => {
+        const nextRol = currentRol === "ADMIN" ? "PERITO" : "ADMIN";
+        setIsUpdating(id);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/usuarios/${id}`, {
+                method: "PATCH",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ rol: nextRol }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                onRefresh();
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error changing user role:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsUpdating(null);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden">
+            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse">
+                    <thead>
+                        <tr className="bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-800">
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest">Usuario</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest">Email</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest">Rol</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest text-center">Estado</th>
+                            <th className="px-6 py-4 text-[10px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-widest text-right">Acciones</th>
+                        </tr>
+                    </thead>
+                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-50">
+                        {usuarios.map((u) => (
+                            <tr key={u.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50/80 transition-colors group">
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+                                        <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-500 group-hover:bg-slate-900 group-hover:text-white transition-all">
+                                            <User className="w-4 h-4" />
+                                        </div>
+                                        <span className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-700">{u.username}</span>
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-slate-500">
+                                    {u.email || <span className="text-slate-300 italic">No especificado</span>}
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider ${u.rol === 'ADMIN'
+                                        ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-100'
+                                        : 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-100'
+                                        }`}>
+                                        <Shield className="w-3 h-3" />
+                                        {u.rol}
+                                    </span>
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <div className="flex justify-center">
+                                        {u.activo === 1 ? (
+                                            <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-verde-principal font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest">
+                                                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Activo
+                                            </span>
+                                        ) : (
+                                            <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-red-500 font-bold text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest">
+                                                <XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Inactivo
+                                            </span>
+                                        )}
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-6 py-4">
+                                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
+                                        <button
+                                            disabled={isUpdating === u.id || u.username === 'admin'}
+                                            onClick={() => toggleActivo(u.id, u.activo)}
+                                            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${u.activo === 1
+                                                ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white border border-red-100'
+                                                : 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-600 hover:text-white border border-emerald-100'
+                                                } disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed`}
+                                        >
+                                            {u.activo === 1 ? "Desactivar" : "Activar"}
+                                        </button>
+                                        <button
+                                            disabled={isUpdating === u.id || u.username === 'admin'}
+                                            onClick={() => changeRol(u.id, u.rol)}
+                                            className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all disabled:opacity-30"
+                                        >
+                                            Cambiar Rol
+                                        </button>
+                                    </div>
+                                </td>
+                            </tr>
+                        ))}
+                    </tbody>
+                </table>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+++ b/app/usuarios/page.tsx

+"use client";
+
+import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
+import UsuariosTable from "./UsuariosTable";
+import NuevoUsuarioForm from "./NuevoUsuarioForm";
+import { Users, ShieldCheck, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react";
+
+export default function UsuariosPage() {
+    const [usuarios, setUsuarios] = useState<any[]>([]);
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+
+    const fetchUsuarios = async () => {
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/usuarios");
+            const data = await res.json();
+            if (Array.isArray(data)) {
+                setUsuarios(data);
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error fetching users:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        fetchUsuarios();
+    }, []);
+
+    return (
+        <main className="p-4 sm:p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto space-y-8 animate-in fade-in duration-700">
+            {/* Header Section */}
+            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-6 pb-6 border-b border-slate-200">
+                <div className="space-y-2">
+                    <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-slate-900 text-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">
+                        <ShieldCheck className="w-3 h-3" /> Administración
+                    </div>
+                    <h1 className="text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 tracking-tight uppercase flex items-center gap-4">
+                        <Users className="w-10 h-10 text-verde-principal" />
+                        Gestión de Usuarios
+                    </h1>
+                    <p className="text-slate-500 font-medium max-w-2xl">
+                        Crea nuevos perritos y tasadores, valida sus cuentas o gestiona sus permisos de acceso al sistema.
+                    </p>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+                    <button
+                        onClick={fetchUsuarios}
+                        className="p-2.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg transition-all"
+                        title="Refrescar lista"
+                    >
+                        <RefreshCw className={`w-5 h-5 ${isLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
+                    </button>
+                    <NuevoUsuarioForm onSuccess={fetchUsuarios} />
+                </div>
+            </div>
+
+            {/* List Section */}
+            {isLoading ? (
+                <div className="h-64 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 text-slate-400">
+                    <RefreshCw className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin" />
+                    <p className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Cargando usuarios...</p>
+                </div>
+            ) : (
+                <UsuariosTable usuarios={usuarios} onRefresh={fetchUsuarios} />
+            )}
+        </main>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/components/InfoTooltip.tsx b/components/InfoTooltip.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ee2fde8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/InfoTooltip.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { Info } from "lucide-react";
+import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
+import { createPortal } from "react-dom";
+
+interface InfoTooltipProps {
+    content: string;
+}
+
+export default function InfoTooltip({ content }: InfoTooltipProps) {
+    const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false);
+    const [coords, setCoords] = useState({ top: 0, left: 0 });
+    const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
+    const triggerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        setMounted(true);
+    }, []);
+
+    const updatePosition = () => {
+        if (triggerRef.current) {
+            const rect = triggerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
+            setCoords({
+                top: rect.top + window.scrollY,
+                left: rect.left + window.scrollX + (rect.width / 2)
+            });
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleMouseEnter = () => {
+        updatePosition();
+        setIsVisible(true);
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <div className="relative inline-flex items-center ml-1 group" ref={triggerRef}>
+            <div
+                onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter}
+                onMouseLeave={() => setIsVisible(false)}
+                className="cursor-help text-gray-400 hover:text-verde-principal transition-colors p-0.5"
+            >
+                <Info size={14} strokeWidth={2.5} />
+            </div>
+
+            {isVisible && mounted && createPortal(
+                <div
+                    style={{
+                        position: 'absolute',
+                        top: `${coords.top}px`,
+                        left: `${coords.left}px`,
+                        transform: 'translate(-50%, -100%)',
+                        marginTop: '-8px'
+                    }}
+                    className="w-48 p-2 bg-verde-principal text-white text-[11px] font-medium rounded shadow-xl z-[9999] pointer-events-none animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-200"
+                >
+                    {content}
+                    <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -mt-1 border-4 border-transparent border-t-verde-principal"></div>
+                </div>,
+                document.body
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+    if (sortConfig.key !== columnId) return <span className="ml-1 text-gray-400 opacity-30 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">↕</span>;
+    return (
+        <span className="ml-1 text-white">
+            {sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}

+function SortArrow({ columnId, sortConfig }: { columnId: string, sortConfig: { key: string; direction: 'asc' | 'desc' } }) {
+    if (sortConfig.key !== columnId) return <span className="ml-1 text-gray-400 opacity-30 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">↕</span>;
+    return (
+        <span className="ml-1 text-white">
+            {sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}
+        </span>
+    );

diff --git a/components/ColumnVisibilityDropdown.tsx b/components/ColumnVisibilityDropdown.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a7d9d49
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/ColumnVisibilityDropdown.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
+import { Settings2, Check } from "lucide-react";
+
+interface Column {
+    id: string;
+    label: string;
+}
+
+interface ColumnVisibilityDropdownProps {
+    columns: Column[];
+    visibleColumns: Record<string, boolean>;
+    onToggle: (columnId: string) => void;
+}
+
+export default function ColumnVisibilityDropdown({
+    columns,
+    visibleColumns,
+    onToggle,
+}: ColumnVisibilityDropdownProps) {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
+
+    // Close dropdown when clicking outside
+    useEffect(() => {
+        function handleClickOutside(event: MouseEvent) {
+            if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
+                setIsOpen(false);
+            }
+        }
+        document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
+        return () => {
+            document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
+        };
+    }, []);
+
+    return (
+        <div className="relative inline-block text-left mb-4" ref={dropdownRef}>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
+                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-verde-principal transition-all shadow-sm"
+            >
+                <Settings2 className="w-4 h-4 text-verde-principal" />
+                Columnas
+            </button>
+
+            {isOpen && (
+                <div className="absolute left-0 mt-2 w-56 bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl shadow-xl z-50 py-2 max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-100">
+                    <div className="px-3 py-1 mb-1 border-b border-gray-50">
+                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 tracking-tighter">
+                            Visibilidad de columnas
+                        </span>
+                    </div>
+                    {columns.map((column) => (
+                        <button
+                            key={column.id}
+                            onClick={() => onToggle(column.id)}
+                            className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-verde-claro/10 transition-colors"
+                        >
+                            <div
+                                className={`flex-shrink-0 w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${visibleColumns[column.id]
+                                        ? "bg-verde-principal border-verde-principal text-white"
+                                        : "bg-white border-gray-200"
+                                    }`}
+                            >
+                                {visibleColumns[column.id] && <Check className="w-3 h-3 stroke-[4]" />}
+                            </div>
+                            <span className={visibleColumns[column.id] ? "font-semibold" : "text-gray-500"}>
+                                {column.label}
+                            </span>
+                        </button>
+                    ))}
+                </div>
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/lib/auth-utils.ts b/lib/auth-utils.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1843570
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/auth-utils.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import { auth } from "@/auth";
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+
+/**
+ * Checks if the current user has the ADMIN role.
+ * Returns the session if is admin, or a NextResponse with 403 error if not.
+ */
+export async function ensureAdmin() {
+    const session = await auth();
+    if (session?.user?.rol !== "ADMIN") {
+        return {
+            isAdmin: false,
+            response: NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "No tienes permisos de administrador para realizar esta acción." },
+                { status: 403 }
+            )
+        };
+    }
+    return { isAdmin: true, session };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Standard generic error response to avoid information disclosure.
+ */
+export function genericErrorResponse(message: string = "Error interno del servidor.", status: number = 500) {
+    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status });
+}

     const isAuthRoute = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/api/auth");
     const isPublicFile = nextUrl.pathname.includes(".") || nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/_next");
-    const isPublicRoute = nextUrl.pathname === "/api/debug-db" || nextUrl.pathname === "/api/temp-migrate";
+    const isPublicRoute = false; // No public API routes allowed for now
 
     // 1. Rate Limiting (Aplicado a todo)
     const ip = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-for") ?? "127.0.0.1";

diff --git a/types/next-auth.d.ts b/types/next-auth.d.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..475cec0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/types/next-auth.d.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import { DefaultSession } from "next-auth";
+
+declare module "next-auth" {
+    /**
+     * Returned by `useSession`, `getSession` and received as a prop on the `SessionProvider` React Context
+     */
+    interface Session {
+        user: {
+            /** The user's role. */
+            rol?: string;
+        } & DefaultSession["user"]
+    }
+
+    interface User {
+        rol?: string;
+    }
+}
+
+declare module "next-auth/jwt" {
+    /** Returned by the `jwt` callback and `getToken`, when using JWT sessions */
+    interface JWT {
+        /** The user's role */
+        rol?: string;
+    }
+}

--- /dev/null

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Updating albaranes table with taller_observaciones...");
+        try {
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE albaranes ADD COLUMN taller_observaciones TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER taller_id");
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log("Albaranes column taller_observaciones might already exist.");
+        }
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Migration (Part 2) complete" });
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Updating albaranes table with taller_observaciones...");
+        try {
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE albaranes ADD COLUMN taller_observaciones TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER taller_id");
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log("Albaranes column taller_observaciones might already exist.");
+        }
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Migration complete" });
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

+const { execute } = require("./lib/db.server");

+async function migrate() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Updating talleres table...");
+        try {
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE talleres ADD COLUMN mano_obra_defecto DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00 AFTER contacto");
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE talleres ADD COLUMN observaciones TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER mano_obra_defecto");
+            console.log("Talleres table updated.");
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log("Talleres columns might already exist.");
+        }
+
+        console.log("Updating modelos table...");
+        try {
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE modelos ADD COLUMN caracteristicas TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER nombre");
+            console.log("Modelos table updated.");
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log("Modelos column might already exist.");
+        }
+
+        console.log("Updating albaranes table...");
+        try {
+            await execute("ALTER TABLE albaranes ADD COLUMN modelo_caracteristicas TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER modelo_id");
+            console.log("Albaranes table updated.");
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.log("Albaranes column might already exist.");
+        }
+
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Migration error:", error);
+    } finally {
+        process.exit();
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();

@@ -190,6 +190,60 @@ export function isValidSpanishTaxId(value: string | null | undefined): boolean {
     return NIF_REGEX.test(cleaned) || NIE_REGEX.test(cleaned) || CIF_REGEX.test(cleaned);
 }
 
+/**
+ * Validates if the control digit/letter of a Spanish Tax ID (NIF/NIE/CIF) is mathematically correct.
+ * Assumes the input already passes `isValidSpanishTaxId` (format check).
+ */
+export function isSpanishTaxIdMathValid(value: string | null | undefined): boolean {
+    if (!value || !isValidSpanishTaxId(value)) return false; // If empty or format is wrong, we consider math false or skip. 
+    // Usually called after format validation.
+
+    const cleaned = value.trim().toUpperCase();
+
+    // NIF / NIE
+    if (/^[0-9XYZ][0-9]{7}[A-Z]$/.test(cleaned)) {
+        const prefix = cleaned.charAt(0);
+        let numberStr = cleaned.substring(0, 8);
+        const controlLetter = cleaned.charAt(8);
+
+        // NIE replacement
+        if (prefix === 'X') numberStr = '0' + numberStr.substring(1);
+        else if (prefix === 'Y') numberStr = '1' + numberStr.substring(1);
+        else if (prefix === 'Z') numberStr = '2' + numberStr.substring(1);
+
+        const number = parseInt(numberStr, 10);
+        const letters = "TRWAGMYFPDXBNJZSQVHLCKE";
+        return letters.charAt(number % 23) === controlLetter;
+    }
+
+    // CIF
+    if (/^[ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSUVW][0-9]{7}[0-9A-J]$/.test(cleaned)) {
+        const lettersControl = "JABCDEFGHI";
+        const digits = cleaned.substring(1, 8);
+        const control = cleaned.charAt(8);
+
+        let sum = 0;
+        for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
+            let num = parseInt(digits.charAt(i), 10);
+            if (i % 2 === 0) { // Odd positions (0-indexed means 0, 2, 4, 6 are the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 7th digits)
+                num *= 2;
+                if (num > 9) num -= 9; // equivalent to sum of digits for numbers 10-18
+            }
+            sum += num;
+        }
+
+        const lastDigit = sum % 10;
+        const expectedControlDigit = lastDigit === 0 ? 0 : 10 - lastDigit;
+        const expectedControlLetter = lettersControl.charAt(expectedControlDigit);
+
+        // For some CIF letters, the control MUST be a number, for others a letter, for others either.
+        // The implementation allows either the matching letter or the matching number, as per standard practice when type is ambiguous.
+        return control === expectedControlDigit.toString() || control === expectedControlLetter;
+    }
+
+    return false;
+}
+
 /**
  * Filtra el texto de un campo de matrícula, dejando solo los caracteres
  * válidos para matrículas europeas: letras (A-Z), dígitos, espacios y guiones.

+async function addProvinciaColumn() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Adding provincia column to proveedores table...");
+        const result = await execute(`
+            ALTER TABLE proveedores 
+            ADD COLUMN provincia VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL AFTER localidad
+        `);
+        console.log("Column added successfully:", result);
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        // If it fails because the column already exists (ER_DUP_FIELDNAME), that's fine
+        if (error.code === 'ER_DUP_FIELDNAME') {
+            console.log("Column provincia already exists.");
+        } else {
+            console.error("Error adding column:", error);
+            process.exit(1);
+        }
+    }
+    process.exit(0);
+}
+
+addProvinciaColumn();

@@ -76,3 +96,50 @@ export async function POST(
         );
     }
 }
+
+/**
+ * DELETE /api/albaranes/[id]/diario?noteId=xxx
+ * Borra una nota del diario si el usuario es el autor o es ADMIN.
+ */
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
+    const noteId = searchParams.get("noteId");
+    const session = await auth();
+
+    if (!session?.user) {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "No autorizado" }, { status: 401 });
+    }
+
+    if (!noteId) {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "ID de nota requerido" }, { status: 400 });
+    }
+
+    try {
+        // Verificar autoría o rol
+        const notes = await query<any>(
+            "SELECT usuario_id FROM albaranes_diario WHERE id = ?",
+            [noteId]
+        );
+
+        if (notes.length === 0) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "Nota no encontrada" }, { status: 404 });
+        }
+
+        const isAdmin = (session.user as any).rol === "ADMIN";
+        const isOwner = String(notes[0].usuario_id) === String((session.user as any).id);
+
+        if (!isAdmin && !isOwner) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "No tienes permiso para borrar esta nota" }, { status: 403 });
+        }
+
+        await execute("DELETE FROM albaranes_diario WHERE id = ?", [noteId]);
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Nota eliminada" });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al borrar nota:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno al borrar" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error:", error);

+        process.exit();

+                setShowResults(true);
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error(error);
+            alert("Error al buscar coincidencias.");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSearching(false);
+        }

diff --git a/app/api/albaranes/coincidencias/route.ts b/app/api/albaranes/coincidencias/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f4bad32
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/albaranes/coincidencias/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/albaranes/coincidencias
+ * Busca posibles duplicados basados en matrícula, referencia de siniestro o nombres.
+ */
+export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
+        const matricula = searchParams.get("matricula")?.trim();
+        const siniestro = searchParams.get("siniestro")?.trim();
+        const asegurado = searchParams.get("asegurado")?.trim();
+        const contrario = searchParams.get("contrario")?.trim();
+        const excludeId = searchParams.get("excludeId");
+
+        if (!matricula && !siniestro && !asegurado && !contrario) {
+            return NextResponse.json([]);
+        }
+
+        let sql = "SELECT id, fecha, matricula, referencia_siniestro, nombre_cliente, nombre2 FROM albaranes WHERE 1=1";
+        const params: any[] = [];
+
+        const conditions: string[] = [];
+
+        if (matricula) {
+            conditions.push("matricula = ?");
+            params.push(matricula);
+        }
+        if (siniestro) {
+            conditions.push("referencia_siniestro = ?");
+            params.push(siniestro);
+        }
+        if (asegurado) {
+            conditions.push("nombre_cliente LIKE ?");
+            params.push(`%${asegurado}%`);
+        }
+        if (contrario) {
+            conditions.push("nombre2 LIKE ?");
+            params.push(`%${contrario}%`);
+        }
+
+        if (conditions.length > 0) {
+            sql += " AND (" + conditions.join(" OR ") + ")";
+        }
+
+        if (excludeId) {
+            sql += " AND id != ?";
+            params.push(excludeId);
+        }
+
+        sql += " ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 50";
+
+        const rows = await query(sql, params);
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        console.error("Error en búsqueda de coincidencias:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error al buscar coincidencias" }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

+

+    const handleBulkDownload = async () => {
+        if (selectedIds.size === 0) return;

+            const img = imagenes.find(i => i.id === id);
+            if (img) {
+                const link = document.createElement("a");
+                link.href = `/api/imagenes/${img.filename}`;
+                link.download = img.filename;
+                link.click();
+            }
+        }

+        if (selectedIds.size !== 1) {

+

+                    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },

+                });
+                if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Error al renombrar");

--- a/app/api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes/[imgId]/route.ts

@@ -30,3 +30,43 @@ export async function DELETE(
         );
     }
 }
+
+/**
+ * PATCH /api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes/[imgId]
+ * Actualiza metadatos de la imagen (nombre, categoría).
+ */
+export async function PATCH(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string, imgId: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id, imgId } = await params;
+    const body = await request.json();
+    const { filename, categoria } = body;
+
+    try {
+        if (filename !== undefined && categoria !== undefined) {
+            await execute(
+                "UPDATE albaranes_imagenes SET filename = ?, categoria = ? WHERE id = ? AND albaran_id = ?",
+                [filename, categoria, imgId, id]
+            );
+        } else if (filename !== undefined) {
+            await execute(
+                "UPDATE albaranes_imagenes SET filename = ? WHERE id = ? AND albaran_id = ?",
+                [filename, imgId, id]
+            );
+        } else if (categoria !== undefined) {
+            await execute(
+                "UPDATE albaranes_imagenes SET categoria = ? WHERE id = ? AND albaran_id = ?",
+                [categoria, imgId, id]
+            );
+        }
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Imagen actualizada." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al actualizar imagen:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al actualizar la imagen." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}

         </div>
     );
 }

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import AlbaranDiario from "./AlbaranDiario";
+import AlbaranFotos from "./AlbaranFotos";
+import AlbaranEconomico from "./AlbaranEconomico";
+
+interface AlbaranDetalleProps {
+    albaran: any;
+    peritos: any[];
+    aseguradoras: any[];
+    marcas: any[];
+    modelos: any[];
+    talleres: any[];
+    onSave: (data: any) => Promise<void>;
+    onClose: () => void;
+    isSubmitting: boolean;
+}
+
+type TabType = "DATOS" | "FOTOS" | "DIARIO" | "ECONOMICO";
+
+export default function AlbaranDetalle({
+    albaran: initialAlbaran,
+    peritos,
+    aseguradoras,
+    marcas,
+    modelos,
+    talleres,
+    onSave,
+    onClose,
+    isSubmitting
+}: AlbaranDetalleProps) {
+    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>("DATOS");
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ ...initialAlbaran });
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {
+        const { name, value } = e.target;
+        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
+    };
+
+    const modelosFiltrados = formData.marca_id
+        ? modelos.filter(m => m.marca_id === Number(formData.marca_id))
+        : modelos;
+
+    const handleAction = (action: string) => {
+        switch(action) {
+            case "VALIDAR":
+                alert("Validando datos del albarán...");
+                // Aquí iría lógica extra de validación si fuera necesaria
+                break;
+            case "TALLER":
+                const t = talleres.find(t => t.id === Number(formData.taller_id));
+                if (t) alert(`Características del Taller:\nNombre: ${t.nombre}\nLocalidad: ${t.localidad}\nTeléfono: ${t.telefono}`);
+                else alert("Seleccione un taller primero.");
+                break;
+            case "BUSCAR":
+                alert(`Buscando coincidencias para matrícula: ${formData.matricula || "vacía"}`);
+                break;
+            default:
+                break;
+        }
+    };
+
+    const tabs: TabType[] = ["DATOS", "FOTOS", "DIARIO", "ECONOMICO"];
+
+    return (
+        <div className="flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden">
+            {/* Cabecera de Pestañas */}
+            <div className="flex overflow-x-auto border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-1 gap-1">
+                <div className="bg-verde-principal text-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase rounded flex items-center shadow-sm">
+                    ALBARÁN {initialAlbaran.id}
+                </div>
+                {tabs.map(tab => (
+                    <button
+                        key={tab}
+                        onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
+                        className={`px-6 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase rounded transition-all ${
+                            activeTab === tab 
+                            ? "bg-white text-verde-principal shadow-sm ring-1 ring-gray-200" 
+                            : "text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200"
+                        }`}
+                    >
+                        {tab}
+                    </button>
+                ))}
+                <button 
+                    onClick={onClose}
+                    className="ml-auto bg-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-500 text-white px-4 py-2 text-xs font-black uppercase rounded shadow-sm"
+                >
+                    SALIR
+                </button>
+            </div>
+
+            {/* Contenido de la Pestaña */}
+            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 bg-white min-h-[400px]">
+                {activeTab === "DATOS" && (
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-4 text-sm animate-in fade-in duration-300">
+                        <div className="space-y-4">
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Fecha:</label>
+                                <input type="date" name="fecha" value={formData.fecha ? new Date(formData.fecha).toISOString().split('T')[0] : ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Perito:</label>
+                                <select name="perito_id" value={formData.perito_id || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 bg-white">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar...</option>
+                                    {peritos.map(p => <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.nombre} {p.apellidos}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Aseguradora:</label>
+                                <select name="aseguradora_id" value={formData.aseguradora_id || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 bg-white">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar...</option>
+                                    {aseguradoras.map(a => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Ref. Siniestro:</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="referencia_siniestro" value={formData.referencia_siniestro || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 uppercase" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Fecha Siniestro:</label>
+                                <input type="date" name="fecha_siniestro" value={formData.fecha_siniestro ? new Date(formData.fecha_siniestro).toISOString().split('T')[0] : ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold text-verde-enfasis">Matricula:</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="matricula" value={formData.matricula || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 uppercase font-bold text-verde-principal" />

+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="space-y-4">
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Vehículo:</label>
+                                <select name="vehiculo_tipo" value={formData.vehiculo_tipo || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 bg-white">
+                                    <option value="TURISMO">Turismo</option>
+                                    <option value="MOTOCICLETA">Motocicleta</option>
+                                    <option value="TODO_TERRENO">Todo Terreno</option>
+                                    <option value="VEHICULO_INDUSTRIAL">Vehículo Industrial</option>
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 items-center">
+                                <label className="text-gray-500 font-bold">Marca:</label>
+                                <select name="marca_id" value={formData.marca_id || ''} onChange={handleChange} className="col-span-2 border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 bg-white">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar...</option>
+                                    {marcas.map(m => <option key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>

+                                </select>
+                            </div>

+++ b/app/albaranes/AlbaranDiario.tsx

+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+
+interface DiarioEntry {
+    id: number;
+    fecha: string;
+    texto: string;
+}
+
+interface AlbaranDiarioProps {
+    albaranId: number;
+}
+
+export default function AlbaranDiario({ albaranId }: AlbaranDiarioProps) {
+    const [entries, setEntries] = useState<DiarioEntry[]>([]);
+    const [newNote, setNewNote] = useState("");
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        fetchEntries();
+    }, [albaranId]);
+
+    const fetchEntries = async () => {
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/albaranes/${albaranId}/diario`);
+            if (res.ok) {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                setEntries(data);
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error fetching diary:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        if (!newNote.trim()) return;
+
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/albaranes/${albaranId}/diario`, {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ texto: newNote }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setNewNote("");
+                fetchEntries();
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error creating note:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <div className="space-y-6">
+            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
+                <label className="block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide">Añadir Nota al Diario</label>
+                <div className="flex gap-2">
+                    <textarea
+                        value={newNote}
+                        onChange={(e) => setNewNote(e.target.value)}
+                        className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-sm min-h-[80px]"
+                        placeholder="Escribe aquí cualquier observación o gestión realizada..."
+                    />
+                    <button
+                        type="submit"
+                        disabled={isSubmitting || !newNote.trim()}
+                        className="bg-verde-principal hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-colors self-end disabled:opacity-50 h-fit"
+                    >
+                        {isSubmitting ? "GUARDANDO..." : "AÑADIR"}
+                    </button>
+                </div>
+            </form>
+
+            <div className="space-y-4">
+                <h3 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-800 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
+                    <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-verde-principal rounded-full"></span>
+                    Historial de Gestiones
+                </h3>
+                
+                {isLoading ? (
+                    <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-400 text-sm">Cargando diario...</div>
+                ) : entries.length === 0 ? (
+                    <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-400 text-sm italic border-2 border-dashed border-gray-100 rounded-xl">
+                        No hay notas registradas para este albarán.
+                    </div>
+                ) : (
+                    <div className="border-l-2 border-gray-100 ml-3 space-y-6">
+                        {entries.map((entry) => (
+                            <div key={entry.id} className="relative pl-6">
+                                <div className="absolute -left-[9px] top-1 w-4 h-4 bg-white border-2 border-verde-principal rounded-full"></div>
+                                <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-verde-enfasis uppercase mb-1">
+                                    {new Date(entry.fecha).toLocaleString('es-ES', { 
+                                        day: '2-digit', 
+                                        month: '2-digit', 
+                                        year: 'numeric',
+                                        hour: '2-digit',
+                                        minute: '2-digit'
+                                    })}
+                                </div>
+                                <div className="bg-white p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm text-sm text-gray-700 whitespace-pre-wrap">
+                                    {entry.texto}
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                        ))}
+                    </div>
+                )}
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+"use client";
+
+interface AlbaranEconomicoProps {
+    albaran: any; // Datos del albarán
+}
+
+export default function AlbaranEconomico({ albaran }: AlbaranEconomicoProps) {
+    // Cálculos ficticios basados en los datos del albarán por ahora
+    const manoObraTotal = (albaran.mano_obra || 0) * (1 - (albaran.descuento || 0) / 100);
+    
+    return (
+        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
+            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
+                <h3 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-800 uppercase mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
+                    <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-verde-principal" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
+                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 7h6m0 10v-3m-3 3h.01M9 17h.01M9 14h.01M12 14h.01M15 11h.01M12 11h.01M9 11h.01M7 21h10a2 2 0 002-2V5a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v14a2 2 0 002 2z" />
+                    </svg>
+                    Resumen de Importes
+                </h3>
+                
+                <div className="space-y-4">
+                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-gray-50">
+                        <span className="text-gray-500 font-medium">Mano de Obra (Bruto)</span>
+                        <span className="font-mono font-bold text-gray-900">{albaran.mano_obra?.toFixed(2)} €/h</span>
+                    </div>
+                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-gray-50">
+                        <span className="text-gray-500 font-medium">Descuento aplicado</span>
+                        <span className="font-mono font-bold text-red-500">-{albaran.descuento || 0}%</span>
+                    </div>
+                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-gray-50">
+                        <span className="text-gray-500 font-medium font-bold">Total Mano de Obra (Neto)</span>
+                        <span className="font-mono font-black text-verde-enfasis text-lg">{manoObraTotal.toFixed(2)} €/h</span>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="mt-8 p-4 bg-verde-claro/10 rounded-xl border border-verde-principal/10">
+                    <p className="text-[10px] text-verde-oscuro/60 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 text-center">Estado del Albarán</p>
+                    <p className="text-center font-black text-verde-principal text-xl">{albaran.estado || "EN CURSO"}</p>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="bg-gray-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 border-dashed flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center">
+                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm mb-4">
+                    <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
+                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 16h-1v-4h-1m1-4h.01M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
+                    </svg>
+                </div>
+                <h4 className="font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1">Cálculos Avanzados</h4>
+                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 max-w-[200px]">Las peritaciones completas y tramos de aseguradora aparecerán una vez finalizado el informe.</p>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+
+interface AlbaranImagen {
+    id: number;
+    filename: string;
+    ruta: string;
+}
+
+interface AlbaranFotosProps {
+    albaranId: number;
+}
+
+export default function AlbaranFotos({ albaranId }: AlbaranFotosProps) {
+    const [imagenes, setImagenes] = useState<AlbaranImagen[]>([]);
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+    const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
+
+    useEffect(() => {
+        console.log("AlbaranFotos rendered with albaranId:", albaranId);
+        if (albaranId) {
+            fetchImagenes();
+        }
+    }, [albaranId]);
+
+    const fetchImagenes = async () => {
+        if (!albaranId) {
+            console.error("fetchImagenes called without albaranId");
+            return;
+        }
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/albaranes/${albaranId}/imagenes`);
+            if (res.ok) {
+                const data = await res.json();
+                setImagenes(data);
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error fetching images:", error);
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
+        const files = e.target.files;
+        if (!files || files.length === 0) return;
+
+        setIsUploading(true);
+        try {
+            for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
+                const file = files[i];
+                const formData = new FormData();
+                formData.append("file", file);
+
+                // 1. Subir el archivo al servidor
+                const uploadRes = await fetch("/api/upload", {
+                    method: "POST",
+                    body: formData,
+                });
+
+                if (!uploadRes.ok) {
+                    const error = await uploadRes.json();
+                    throw new Error(error.error || "Error al subir archivo");
+                }
+
+                const uploadData = await uploadRes.json();
+                console.log("Archivo subido a disco, vinculando...", uploadData);
+                
+                // 2. Vincular con el albarán en la base de datos
+                const linkRes = await fetch(`/api/albaranes/${albaranId}/imagenes`, {
+                    method: "POST",
+                    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                    body: JSON.stringify({
+                        filename: uploadData.filename,
+                        ruta: uploadData.path,
+                        tamano: uploadData.size,
+                        tipo: "IMAGEN"
+                    }),
+                });
+
+                if (!linkRes.ok) {
+                    const error = await linkRes.json();
+                    throw new Error(error.error || `Error al vincular imagen: ${error.message || "Error desconocido"}`);
+                }
+            }
+            fetchImagenes();
+        } catch (error: any) {
+            console.error("Error uploading images:", error);
+            alert(error.message || "Error al subir alguna imagen");
+        } finally {
+            setIsUploading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    const handleDelete = async (imgId: number) => {
+        if (!confirm("¿Seguro que quieres eliminar esta imagen?")) return;
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch(`/api/albaranes/${albaranId}/imagenes/${imgId}`, {
+                method: "DELETE",
+            });
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setImagenes(prev => prev.filter(img => img.id !== imgId));
+            }
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error("Error deleting image:", error);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <div className="space-y-6">
+            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                <h3 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-800 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
+                    <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-verde-principal" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
+                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M4 16l4.586-4.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L16 16m-2-2l1.586-1.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L20 14m-6-6h.01M6 20h12a2 2 0 002-2V6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z" />
+                    </svg>
+                    Galería de Fotos
+                </h3>
+                
+                <label className="cursor-pointer bg-verde-principal hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm">
+                    {isUploading ? "SUBIENDO..." : "+ AÑADIR FOTOS"}
+                    <input 
+                        type="file" 
+                        multiple 
+                        accept="image/*" 
+                        className="hidden" 
+                        onChange={handleUpload}
+                        disabled={isUploading}
+                    />
+                </label>
+            </div>
+
+            {isLoading ? (
+                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
+                    {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(n => (
+                        <div key={n} className="aspect-square bg-gray-100 animate-pulse rounded-xl"></div>
+                    ))}
+                </div>
+            ) : imagenes.length === 0 ? (
+                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 rounded-2xl bg-gray-50/50">
+                    <svg className="w-16 h-16 text-gray-300 mb-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
+                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1} d="M4 16l4.586-4.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L16 16m-2-2l1.586-1.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L20 14m-6-6h.01M6 20h12a2 2 0 002-2V6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z" />
+                    </svg>
+                    <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">No hay fotos en este albarán</p>
+                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs mt-1">Sube imágenes para documentar el peritaje</p>
+                </div>
+            ) : (
+                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
+                    {imagenes.map((img) => (
+                        <div key={img.id} className="group relative aspect-square bg-gray-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:ring-2 hover:ring-verde-principal transition-all">
+                            {/* En un entorno real usaríamos una URL accesible, aquí simulamos con un placeholder si no podemos servir archivos del disco directamente */}
+                            {/* Pero como Next.js suele servir /public o tenemos un route para imágenes, asumimos que se puede ver */}
+                            {/* Para el demo usaremos una imagen genérica si la ruta es local de windows y no está mapeada */}
+                            <img 
+                                src={`/api/imagenes/${img.filename}`} 
+                                alt={img.filename}
+                                className="w-full h-full object-cover"
+                                onError={(e) => {
+                                    (e.target as HTMLImageElement).src = "https://placehold.co/400x400/f3f4f6/9ca3af?text=IMAGEN";
+                                }}
+                            />
+                            <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
+                                <button
+                                    onClick={() => handleDelete(img.id)}
+                                    className="p-2 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-full hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors"
+                                    title="Eliminar"
+                                >
+                                    <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
+                                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M19 7l-.867 12.142A2 2 0 0116.138 21H7.862a2 2 0 01-1.995-1.858L5 7m5 4v6m4-6v6m1-10V4a1 1 0 00-1-1h-4a1 1 0 00-1 1v3M4 7h16" />
+                                    </svg>
+                                </button>
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+                    ))}
+                </div>
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

index 0000000..f3b0c56

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/albaranes/[id]/diario
+ * Obtiene las notas del diario de un albarán.
+ */
+export async function GET(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        // Asegurar que la tabla existe (Auto-migración segura)
+        await execute(`
+            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS albaranes_diario (
+                id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+                albaran_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
+                fecha TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                texto TEXT NOT NULL,
+                CONSTRAINT fk_diario_albaran
+                    FOREIGN KEY (albaran_id) REFERENCES albaranes(id)
+                    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+            ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+        `);
+
+        const rows = await query(
+            "SELECT * FROM albaranes_diario WHERE albaran_id = ? ORDER BY fecha DESC",
+            [id]
+        );
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener diario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al consultar el diario." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * POST /api/albaranes/[id]/diario
+ * Añade una nota al diario de un albarán.
+ */
+export async function POST(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        const { texto } = await request.json();
+
+        if (!texto) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "El texto de la nota es obligatorio." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO albaranes_diario (albaran_id, texto) VALUES (?, ?)",
+            [id, texto]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Nota añadida.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear nota en diario:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al crear la nota." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { unlink } from "fs/promises";
+
+/**
+ * DELETE /api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes/[imgId]
+ * Desvincula y borra una imagen del disco.
+ */
+export async function DELETE(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string, imgId: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id, imgId } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        // En un sistema real, primero buscaríamos la ruta en la DB para borrar el archivo del disco
+        // Pero por ahora solo borramos el registro de la DB para simplificar y evitar errores si el archivo no existe
+        
+        await execute(
+            "DELETE FROM albaranes_imagenes WHERE id = ? AND albaran_id = ?",
+            [imgId, id]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json({ message: "Imagen eliminada." });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al eliminar imagen:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al eliminar la imagen." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes
+ * Obtiene las imágenes vinculadas a un albarán.
+ */
+export async function GET(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        // Asegurar que la tabla existe
+        await execute(`
+            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS albaranes_imagenes (
+                id          INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+                albaran_id  INT UNSIGNED  NOT NULL,
+                filename    VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
+                ruta        VARCHAR(500)  NOT NULL,
+                tipo        ENUM('IMAGEN','PDF','OTRO') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IMAGEN',
+                tamano      INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+                created_at  TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                CONSTRAINT fk_imagenes_albaran
+                    FOREIGN KEY (albaran_id) REFERENCES albaranes(id)
+                    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+            ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+        `);
+
+        const rows = await query(
+            "SELECT * FROM albaranes_imagenes WHERE albaran_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC",
+            [id]
+        );
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener imágenes:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al consultar imágenes." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * POST /api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes
+ * Vincula una imagen subida con un albarán.
+ */
+export async function POST(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
+) {
+    const { id } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        // Asegurar que la tabla existe (Repetido en POST por seguridad)
+        await execute(`
+            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS albaranes_imagenes (
+                id          INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+                albaran_id  INT UNSIGNED  NOT NULL,
+                filename    VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
+                ruta        VARCHAR(500)  NOT NULL,
+                tipo        ENUM('IMAGEN','PDF','OTRO') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IMAGEN',
+                tamano      INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+                created_at  TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                CONSTRAINT fk_imagenes_albaran
+                    FOREIGN KEY (albaran_id) REFERENCES albaranes(id)
+                    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+            ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+        `);
+
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { filename, ruta, tamano, tipo } = body;
+
+        console.log(`Intentando vincular imagen para albarán ID: ${id}`, { body });
+
+        // 1. Verificar si el albarán existe
+        const albaranes = await query("SELECT id FROM albaranes WHERE id = ?", [Number(id)]);
+        if (albaranes.length === 0) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: `El albarán con ID ${id} no existe en la base de datos.` },
+                { status: 404 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        if (!filename || !ruta) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "Faltan datos de la imagen (filename, ruta)." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO albaranes_imagenes (albaran_id, filename, ruta, tamano, tipo) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
+            [Number(id), filename, ruta, tamano || null, tipo || "IMAGEN"]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Imagen vinculada.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        console.error("Error al vincular imagen:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: `Error al vincular: ${error.message}. ID Albarán: ${id}` },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * DELETE /api/albaranes/[id]/imagenes/[imgId]
+ * Desvincula una imagen. (Nota: esta ruta requiere imgId, pero la pondremos dentro de este archivo si es simple o crearemos subcarpeta)
+ * Por simplicidad, implementaremos DELETE en una ruta hija o usaremos un query param si el diseño lo permite.
+ * Mejor crear la subcarpeta [imgId] para seguir el estándar de Next.js.
+ */

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db.server";
+
+export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const albaranes = await query("SELECT id FROM albaranes ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5");
+        const tables = await query("SHOW TABLES");
+        const imagenes = await query("SELECT * FROM albaranes_imagenes LIMIT 5");
+        
+        return NextResponse.json({
+            albaranes,
+            tables,
+            imagenes
+        });
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/imagenes/[filename]/route.ts b/app/api/imagenes/[filename]/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..30087b8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/imagenes/[filename]/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { readFile } from "fs/promises";
+import path from "path";
+
+const UPLOAD_DIR = process.env.UPLOAD_DIR ?? "./uploads";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/imagenes/[filename]
+ * Sirve una imagen desde el directorio de subidas.
+ */
+export async function GET(
+    request: NextRequest,
+    { params }: { params: Promise<{ filename: string }> }
+) {
+    const { filename } = await params;
+
+    try {
+        const filePath = path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, filename);
+        const fileBuffer = await readFile(filePath);
+        
+        const extension = path.extname(filename).toLowerCase();
+        let contentType = "image/jpeg";
+        if (extension === ".png") contentType = "image/png";
+        else if (extension === ".webp") contentType = "image/webp";
+        else if (extension === ".gif") contentType = "image/gif";
+
+        return new NextResponse(fileBuffer, {
+            headers: {
+                "Content-Type": contentType,
+                "Cache-Control": "public, max-age=31536000, immutable",
+            },
+        });
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al servir imagen:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Imagen no encontrada." },
+            { status: 404 }
+        );
+    }
+}

+import { execute } from "./lib/db.server";
+
+async function migrate() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Creando tabla albaranes_diario...");
+        await execute(`
+            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS albaranes_diario (
+                id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+                albaran_id INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
+                fecha TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                texto TEXT NOT NULL,
+                CONSTRAINT fk_diario_albaran
+                    FOREIGN KEY (albaran_id) REFERENCES albaranes(id)
+                    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+            ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+        `);
+        console.log("Tabla creada correctamente.");
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error en la migración:", error);
+    } finally {
+        process.exit();
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();
