@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import NuevoModeloForm from "./NuevoModeloForm";
+
+interface Marca {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+}
+
+interface Modelo {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    marca_id: number;
+    marca_nombre: string;
+}
+
+interface ModelosTableProps {
+    modelos: Modelo[];
+    marcas: Marca[];
+}
+
+export default function ModelosTable({ modelos, marcas }: ModelosTableProps) {
+    const [editingModelo, setEditingModelo] = useState<Modelo | null>(null);
+
+    return (
+        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden text-sm">
+            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                <table className="w-full">
+                    <thead>
+                        <tr className="bg-verde-principal text-white font-bold uppercase text-[11px] tracking-wider">
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left w-24">ID</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Marca</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Modelo</th>
+                        </tr>
+                    </thead>
+                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
+                        {modelos.map((m) => (
+                            <tr
+                                key={m.id}
+                                onClick={() => setEditingModelo(m)}
+                                className="hover:bg-verde-claro/20 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
+                            >
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis border-l-2 border-l-transparent group-hover:border-l-verde-principal">
+                                    {m.id}
+                                </td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-gray-700">{m.marca_nombre}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-bold text-gray-900">{m.nombre}</td>
+                            </tr>
+                        ))}
+                    </tbody>
+                </table>
+            </div>
+
+            {/* Modal de edición */}
+            {editingModelo && (
+                <NuevoModeloForm 
+                    key={editingModelo.id}
+                    marcas={marcas}
+                    initialData={editingModelo} 
+                    isEditMode={true} 
+                    onClose={() => setEditingModelo(null)} 
+                />
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import NuevoTallerForm from "./NuevoTallerForm";
+
+interface Taller {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    direccion: string | null;
+    localidad: string | null;
+    provincia: string | null;
+    telefono: string | null;
+    email: string | null;
+    activo: number;
+}
+
+interface TalleresTableProps {
+    talleres: Taller[];
+}
+
+export default function TalleresTable({ talleres }: TalleresTableProps) {
+    const [editingTaller, setEditingTaller] = useState<Taller | null>(null);
+
+    return (
+        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden text-sm">
+            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                <table className="w-full">
+                    <thead>
+                        <tr className="bg-verde-principal text-white font-bold uppercase text-[11px] tracking-wider">
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">ID</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Nombre</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Dirección</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Localidad</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Provincia</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Teléfono</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-left">Email</th>
+                            <th className="px-4 py-4 text-center">Estado</th>
+                        </tr>
+                    </thead>
+                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
+                        {talleres.map((t) => (
+                            <tr
+                                key={t.id}
+                                onClick={() => setEditingTaller(t)}
+                                className="hover:bg-verde-claro/20 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
+                            >
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis border-l-2 border-l-transparent group-hover:border-l-verde-principal">{t.id}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-bold text-gray-900">{t.nombre}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-600 italic text-xs">{t.direccion ?? "—"}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-gray-700">{t.localidad ?? "—"}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-500 uppercase text-[10px] font-bold">{t.provincia ?? "—"}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-gray-600">{t.telefono ?? "—"}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-500">{t.email ?? "—"}</td>
+                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-center">
+                                    <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter ${
+                                        t.activo ? "bg-verde-claro text-verde-oscuro border border-verde-principal/20" : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-400 border border-gray-200"
+                                    }`}>
+                                        {t.activo ? "Activo" : "Inactivo"}
+                                    </span>
+                                </td>
+                            </tr>
+                        ))}
+                    </tbody>
+                </table>
+            </div>
+
+            {/* Modal de edición */}
+            {editingTaller && (
+                <NuevoTallerForm 
+                    key={editingTaller.id}
+                    initialData={editingTaller} 
+                    isEditMode={true} 
+                    onClose={() => setEditingTaller(null)} 
+                />
+            )}
+        </div>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/lib/migrate-unique-talleres.ts b/lib/migrate-unique-talleres.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f2fcd31
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/migrate-unique-talleres.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+import { execute } from "./db.server";
+
+async function migrate() {
+    try {
+        console.log("Iniciando migración: Añadiendo índice UNIQUE a talleres.nombre...");
+        
+        // Intentar añadir el índice UNIQUE
+        // Nota: Si ya existen duplicados, esto fallará, lo cual es correcto para alertar al usuario.
+        await execute("ALTER TABLE talleres ADD UNIQUE INDEX uk_talleres_nombre (nombre)");
+        
+        console.log("Migración completada con éxito.");
+        process.exit(0);
+    } catch (error: any) {
+        if (error.code === 'ER_DUP_ENTRY') {
+            console.error("ERROR: No se pudo aplicar el índice UNIQUE porque ya existen talleres con nombres duplicados.");
+            console.error("Por favor, revisa la base de datos y unifica los nombres antes de reintentar.");
+        } else {
+            console.error("Error inesperado en la migración:", error);
+        }
+        process.exit(1);
+    }
+}
+
+migrate();

+/**
+ * Comprueba si una cadena contiene solo dígitos.
+ */
+export function isNumeric(str: string): boolean {
+    return /^\d+$/.test(str);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Valida si un teléfono tiene exactamente 9 dígitos.
+ */
+export function isValidPhone(phone: string | null | undefined): boolean {
+    if (!phone) return true; // Permitir vacío si no es obligatorio
+    const cleaned = phone.replace(/\s+/g, "");
+    return /^\d{9}$/.test(cleaned);
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..359d725
--- /dev/null
+++ b/db/create_admin.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+-- Crea la tabla de usuarios si no existe
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usuarios (
+  id INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  username VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
+  password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
+  email VARCHAR(150),
+  rol ENUM('ADMIN', 'PERITO') DEFAULT 'PERITO',
+  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Inserta el usuario admin con la contraseña 'admin' encriptada con bcrypt
+INSERT INTO usuarios (username, password, email, rol) 
+VALUES ('admin', '$2b$10$QCgegq9ckII8VVQFmxSKF.3SdTv.AkrWc40enroc3ZaM7suq74o9e', 'admin@peritaciones.es', 'ADMIN')
+ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password = VALUES(password);

--- a/lib/sanitize.ts
+++ b/lib/sanitize.ts
@@ -29,3 +29,26 @@ export function sanitizeObject<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(obj: T): T {
     }
     return sanitized;
 }
+
+/**
+ * Comprueba si una cadena contiene caracteres no permitidos (inyección/XSS).
+ * Útil para validación en Frontend antes de enviar el formulario.
+ */
+export function hasInvalidChars(input: string | null | undefined): boolean {
+    if (!input) return false;
+    return /[<>=;]/.test(String(input));
+}
+
+/**
+ * Valida un payload completo en el Frontend antes de enviarlo a la API.
+ * Retorna `false` si encuentra caracteres prohibidos, `true` si es seguro enviar.
+ */
+export function validateFrontend(payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
+    if (!payload) return true;
+    for (const key in payload) {
+        if (typeof payload[key] === "string" && hasInvalidChars(payload[key] as string)) {
+            return false;
+        }
+    }
+    return true;
+}

diff --git a/app/login/page.tsx b/app/login/page.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1a08176
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/login/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,110 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+
+export default function LoginPage() {
+    const [username, setUsername] = useState("");
+    const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
+    const [error, setError] = useState("");
+    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsLoading(true);
+        setError("");
+
+        try {
+            const result = await signIn("credentials", {
+                username: username.trim(),
+                password: password,
+                redirect: false,
+            });
+
+            console.log("Login result:", result);
+
+            if (result?.error) {
+                // NextAuth devuelve errores específicos en result.error
+                setError("Usuario o contraseña incorrectos. Por favor, revisa tus datos.");
+            } else if (result?.ok) {
+                router.push("/");
+                router.refresh();
+            } else {
+                setError("Error desconocido al iniciar sesión. Inténtalo de nuevo.");
+            }
+        } catch (err: any) {
+            console.error("Login catch error:", err);
+            setError("Error de conexión con el servidor. Verifica que el servidor esté encendido.");
+        } finally {
+            setIsLoading(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo flex items-center justify-center p-4 font-sans">
+            <div className="max-w-md w-full bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden">
+                <div className="bg-slate-900 py-8 px-4 text-center">
+                    <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
+                        <span className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white uppercase">Peritaciones</span>
+                        <span className="text-2xl font-light text-slate-300 uppercase">Aguilera</span>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="p-8">
+                    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
+                        {error && (
+                            <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-100 text-red-600 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center">
+                                <span className="mr-2">⚠️</span>
+                                {error}
+                            </div>
+                        )}
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
+                                Usuario
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="text"
+                                required
+                                value={username}
+                                onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
+                                className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all outline-none"
+                                placeholder="Introduce tu usuario"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">
+                                Contraseña
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="password"
+                                required
+                                value={password}
+                                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
+                                className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all outline-none"
+                                placeholder="••••••••"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isLoading}
+                            className="w-full bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white font-bold py-3.5 rounded-lg shadow-lg transform transition-all active:scale-[0.98] disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed uppercase tracking-widest text-sm"
+                        >
+                            {isLoading ? "Validando..." : "Acceder al Sistema"}
+                        </button>
+                    </form>
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="bg-slate-50 px-8 py-4 border-t border-slate-100 text-center">
+                    <p className="text-slate-400 text-xs text-balance">
+                        © {new Date().getFullYear()} Peritaciones Aguilera. Sistema de uso restringido.
+                    </p>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+import NextAuth from "next-auth";
+import Credentials from "next-auth/providers/credentials";
+
+export const authConfig = {
+    providers: [
+        Credentials({
+            name: "Credentials",
+            credentials: {
+                username: { label: "Usuario", type: "text" },
+                password: { label: "Contraseña", type: "password" },
+            },
+            async authorize(credentials) {
+                // This will be overridden in the server-side auth.ts
+                return null;
+            },
+        }),
+    ],
+    pages: {
+        signIn: "/login",
+    },
+    session: {
+        strategy: "jwt" as const,
+    },
+    trustHost: true,
+    callbacks: {
+        async jwt({ token, user }: any) {
+            if (user) {
+                token.id = user.id;
+            }
+            return token;
+        },
+        async session({ session, token }: any) {
+            if (session.user) {
+                (session.user as any).id = token.id;
+            }
+            return session;
+        },
+    },
+    secret: process.env.AUTH_SECRET || "v9MZ17k9R6BRgx5t9OR8nO0TgoUaGyVAeJXPF5DTd5IVlpQT2",
+};
diff --git a/auth.ts b/auth.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..28aee56
--- /dev/null
+++ b/auth.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import NextAuth from "next-auth";
+import Credentials from "next-auth/providers/credentials";
+import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db.server";
+import { authConfig } from "./auth.config";
+
+export const { handlers, signIn, signOut, auth } = NextAuth({
+    ...authConfig,
+    providers: [
+        Credentials({
+            name: "Credentials",
+            credentials: {
+                username: { label: "Usuario", type: "text" },
+                password: { label: "Contraseña", type: "password" },
+            },
+            async authorize(credentials) {
+                if (!credentials?.username || !credentials?.password) return null;
+
+                const users = await query<any>(
+                    "SELECT * FROM usuarios WHERE username = ? LIMIT 1",
+                    [credentials.username]
+                );
+
+                const user = users[0];
+                if (!user) return null;
+
+                const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(
+                    credentials.password as string,
+                    user.password
+                );
+
+                if (!isValid) return null;
+
+                return {
+                    id: user.id.toString(),
+                    name: user.username,
+                    email: user.email,
+                };
+            },
+        }),
+    ],
+});

         );
     }
 
+    // 2. Auth Guard
+    // NO redirigir si ya estamos en login, si es un archivo estático o si es la propia ruta de Auth.js
+    if (!isLoggedIn && !isLoginPage && !isAuthRoute && !isPublicFile) {

diff --git a/lib/sanitize.ts b/lib/sanitize.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9036584
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/sanitize.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+/**
+ * Elimina caracteres que podrían usarse para inyecciones SQL o XSS.
+ * Aunque los "prepared statements" protegen contra SQLi, esto añade una capa de "defense in depth"
+ * y evita que se inserten tags HTML (<script>) o comandos extraños.
+ */
+export function sanitizeString(input: string | null | undefined): string | null {
+    if (input === null || input === undefined) return null;
+    if (typeof input !== "string") return String(input);
+
+    // Elimina <, >, ;, y =, que son comunes en inyecciones
+    // Reemplaza múltiples espacios por uno solo
+    return input
+        .replace(/[<>=;]/g, "")
+        .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
+        .trim();
+}
+
+/**
+ * Sanitiza todos los valores de un objeto que sean cadenas de texto.
+ */
+export function sanitizeObject<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(obj: T): T {
+    if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return obj;
+
+    const sanitized = { ...obj };
+    for (const key in sanitized) {
+        if (typeof sanitized[key] === "string") {
+            (sanitized as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = sanitizeString(sanitized[key] as string);
+        }
+    }
+    return sanitized;
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+interface SelectOption { id: number; nombre: string; }
+
+interface NuevoAlbaranFormProps {
+    aseguradoras: SelectOption[];
+    marcas: SelectOption[];
+    modelos: { id: number; nombre: string; marca_id: number }[];
+    talleres: SelectOption[];
+    peritos: { id: number; nombre: string; apellidos: string }[];
+}
+
+export default function NuevoAlbaranForm({
+    aseguradoras, marcas, modelos, talleres, peritos
+}: NuevoAlbaranFormProps) {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        fecha: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
+        perito_id: "",
+        aseguradora_id: "",
+        referencia_siniestro: "",
+        fecha_siniestro: "",
+        matricula: "",
+        nombre_cliente: "",
+        vehiculo_tipo: "TURISMO",
+        marca_id: "",
+        modelo_id: "",
+        garantia: "CONVENIO",
+        taller_id: "",
+        email: "",
+        localidad: "",
+        telefono: "",
+        mano_obra: "",
+        descuento: "",
+        matricula2: "",
+        nombre2: "",
+    });
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {
+        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
+    };
+
+    const modelosFiltrados = formData.marca_id
+        ? modelos.filter(m => m.marca_id === Number(formData.marca_id))
+        : modelos;
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/albaranes", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({
+                    ...formData,
+                    perito_id: formData.perito_id ? Number(formData.perito_id) : null,
+                    aseguradora_id: formData.aseguradora_id ? Number(formData.aseguradora_id) : null,
+                    marca_id: formData.marca_id ? Number(formData.marca_id) : null,
+                    modelo_id: formData.modelo_id ? Number(formData.modelo_id) : null,
+                    taller_id: formData.taller_id ? Number(formData.taller_id) : null,
+                    mano_obra: formData.mano_obra ? parseFloat(formData.mano_obra) : 0,
+                    descuento: formData.descuento ? parseFloat(formData.descuento) : 0,
+                }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh();
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear el albarán");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nuevo Albarán
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Crear Nuevo Albarán" maxWidth="max-w-5xl">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-6">
+
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
+
+                        {/* CABECERA */}
+                        <div className="bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg md:col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 border border-gray-100">
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase">Fecha *</label>
+                                <input type="date" name="fecha" value={formData.fecha} onChange={handleChange} required className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-verde-principal text-sm" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase">Perito</label>
+                                <select name="perito_id" value={formData.perito_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-verde-principal text-sm bg-white">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar Perito</option>
+                                    {peritos.map(p => <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.nombre} {p.apellidos}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase">Aseguradora</label>
+                                <select name="aseguradora_id" value={formData.aseguradora_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-verde-principal text-sm bg-white">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar Aseguradora</option>
+                                    {aseguradoras.map(a => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+
+                        {/* DATOS DEL SINIESTRO Y ASEGURADO */}
+                        <div className="md:col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Ref. Siniestro</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="referencia_siniestro" value={formData.referencia_siniestro} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Fecha Siniestro</label>
+                                <input type="date" name="fecha_siniestro" value={formData.fecha_siniestro} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Garantía</label>
+                                <select name="garantia" value={formData.garantia} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent bg-white">
+                                    <option value="CONVENIO">Convenio</option>
+                                    <option value="RESTO">Resto</option>
+                                    <option value="MOTO">Moto</option>
+                                    <option value="LUNAS">Lunas</option>
+                                    <option value="ROBO">Robo</option>
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Asegurado / Cliente</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="nombre_cliente" value={formData.nombre_cliente} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Email Cliente</label>
+                                <input type="email" name="email" value={formData.email} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+
+                        {/* DATOS DEL VEHÍCULO Y TALLER */}
+                        <div className="md:col-span-3 bg-gray-50/50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Tipo</label>
+                                <select name="vehiculo_tipo" value={formData.vehiculo_tipo} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-sm">
+                                    <option value="TURISMO">Turismo</option>
+                                    <option value="MOTOCICLETA">Motocicleta</option>

+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Matrícula</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="matricula" value={formData.matricula} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded uppercase font-mono font-bold text-sm" placeholder="1234ABC" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Marca</label>
+                                <select name="marca_id" value={formData.marca_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-sm">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar Marca</option>
+                                    {marcas.map(m => <option key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Modelo</label>
+                                <select name="modelo_id" value={formData.modelo_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-sm" disabled={!formData.marca_id}>
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar Modelo</option>
+                                    {modelosFiltrados.map(m => <option key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+
+                            <div className="md:col-span-2 pt-2">
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Taller de Reparación</label>
+                                <select name="taller_id" value={formData.taller_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-sm">
+                                    <option value="">Seleccionar Taller</option>
+                                    {talleres.map(t => <option key={t.id} value={t.id}>{t.nombre}</option>)}
+                                </select>
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="pt-2">
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Localidad del Taller</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="localidad" value={formData.localidad} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded uppercase text-sm" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="pt-2">
+                                <label className="block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-1">Telf. Taller</label>
+                                <input type="tel" name="telefono" value={formData.telefono} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded text-sm" />
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+
+                        {/* CONTRARIO E IMPORTES */}
+                        <div className="md:col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
+                            <div>
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Matrícula Contrario</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="matricula2" value={formData.matricula2} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-verde-principal uppercase font-mono" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="md:col-span-3">
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Asegurado Contrario</label>
+                                <input type="text" name="nombre2" value={formData.nombre2} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-verde-principal uppercase" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Mano de Obra Hora (€)</label>
+                                <input type="number" step="0.01" name="mano_obra" value={formData.mano_obra} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-verde-principal text-right font-mono" />
+                            </div>
+                            <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Descuento (%)</label>
+                                <input type="number" step="0.01" name="descuento" value={formData.descuento} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-verde-principal text-right font-mono" />
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
+                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} className="px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50">Cancelar</button>
+                        <button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting} className="px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50">
+                            {isSubmitting ? "Guardando Albarán..." : "Guardar Albarán"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );

diff --git a/app/albaranes/page.tsx b/app/albaranes/page.tsx

+++ b/app/albaranes/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db";
+import NuevoAlbaranForm from "./NuevoAlbaranForm";
+
+// Tipado del row con JOINs
+interface AlbaranRow {
+    id: number;
+    fecha: string;
+    referencia_siniestro: string | null;
+    matricula: string | null;
+    nombre_cliente: string | null;
+    vehiculo_tipo: string;
+    garantia: string;
+    localidad: string | null;
+    telefono: string | null;
+    estado: string;
+    gestion: string | null;
+    perito_nombre: string | null;
+    perito_apellidos: string | null;
+    aseguradora_nombre: string | null;
+    marca_nombre: string | null;
+    modelo_nombre: string | null;
+    taller_nombre: string | null;
+}
+
+export default async function AlbaranesPage() {
+    const albaranes = await query<AlbaranRow>(
+        `SELECT
+      a.id, a.fecha, a.referencia_siniestro, a.matricula,
+      a.nombre_cliente, a.vehiculo_tipo, a.garantia,
+      a.localidad, a.telefono, a.estado, a.gestion,
+      p.nombre AS perito_nombre, p.apellidos AS perito_apellidos,
+      aseg.nombre AS aseguradora_nombre,
+      m.nombre AS marca_nombre,
+      mo.nombre AS modelo_nombre,
+      t.nombre AS taller_nombre
+    FROM albaranes a
+    LEFT JOIN peritos p ON a.perito_id = p.id
+    LEFT JOIN aseguradoras aseg ON a.aseguradora_id = aseg.id
+    LEFT JOIN marcas m ON a.marca_id = m.id
+    LEFT JOIN modelos mo ON a.modelo_id = mo.id
+    LEFT JOIN talleres t ON a.taller_id = t.id
+    ORDER BY a.id DESC`
+    );
+
+    const aseguradoras = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT id, nombre FROM aseguradoras ORDER BY nombre");
+    const marcas = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT id, nombre FROM marcas ORDER BY nombre");
+    const modelos = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string, marca_id: number }>("SELECT id, nombre, marca_id FROM modelos ORDER BY nombre");
+    const talleres = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT id, nombre FROM talleres ORDER BY nombre");
+    const peritos = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string, apellidos: string }>("SELECT id, nombre, apellidos FROM peritos ORDER BY nombre");
+
+    return (
+        <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo">
+            <Navbar />
+            <main className="max-w-[1700px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
+                {/* Cabecera */}
+                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
+                    <div>
+                        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Albaranes</h1>
+                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">
+                            {albaranes.length} albaranes presentados
+                        </p>
+                    </div>
+                    <NuevoAlbaranForm
+                        aseguradoras={aseguradoras}
+                        marcas={marcas}
+                        modelos={modelos}
+                        talleres={talleres}
+                        peritos={peritos}
+                    />
+                </div>
+
+                {/* Tabla */}
+                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
+                    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                        <table className="w-full text-sm">
+                            <thead>
+                                <tr className="bg-verde-principal text-white">
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Núm.</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Fecha</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Perito</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Aseguradora</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Referencia</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Garantía</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Matrícula</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Marca</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Modelo</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Taller</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Localidad</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Teléfono</th>
+                                    <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left font-medium">Estado</th>
+                                </tr>
+                            </thead>
+                            <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
+                                {albaranes.map((a) => (
+                                    <tr key={a.id} className="hover:bg-verde-claro/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis">{a.id}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{new Date(a.fecha).toLocaleDateString("es-ES")}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.perito_apellidos ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.aseguradora_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5 font-mono text-xs">{a.referencia_siniestro ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.garantia}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5 font-mono">{a.matricula ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.marca_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.modelo_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.taller_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.localidad ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">{a.telefono ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
+                                            <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${a.estado === "EN CURSO"
+                                                ? "bg-verde-claro text-verde-oscuro"
+                                                : a.estado === "CERRADO"
+                                                    ? "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600"
+                                                    : "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700"
+                                                }`}>
+                                                {a.estado}
+                                            </span>
+                                        </td>
+                                    </tr>
+                                ))}
+                            </tbody>
+                        </table>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+            </main>
+        </div>
+    );
+}
diff --git a/app/api/albaranes/route.ts b/app/api/albaranes/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..69b5b6c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/albaranes/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/albaranes
+ * Lista todos los albaranes con datos de relaciones (JOINs).
+ */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query(
+            `SELECT
+        a.id, a.fecha, a.referencia_siniestro, a.matricula,
+        a.nombre_cliente, a.vehiculo_tipo, a.garantia,
+        a.localidad, a.telefono, a.estado, a.gestion, a.aviso,
+        a.mano_obra, a.descuento,
+        p.nombre AS perito_nombre, p.apellidos AS perito_apellidos,
+        aseg.nombre AS aseguradora_nombre,
+        m.nombre AS marca_nombre,
+        mo.nombre AS modelo_nombre,
+        t.nombre AS taller_nombre
+      FROM albaranes a
+      LEFT JOIN peritos p ON a.perito_id = p.id
+      LEFT JOIN aseguradoras aseg ON a.aseguradora_id = aseg.id
+      LEFT JOIN marcas m ON a.marca_id = m.id
+      LEFT JOIN modelos mo ON a.modelo_id = mo.id
+      LEFT JOIN talleres t ON a.taller_id = t.id
+      ORDER BY a.id DESC`
+        );
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener albaranes:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al consultar albaranes." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * POST /api/albaranes
+ * Crea un nuevo albarán.
+ */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const {
+            fecha, perito_id, aseguradora_id, referencia_siniestro,
+            fecha_siniestro, matricula, nombre_cliente, vehiculo_tipo,
+            marca_id, modelo_id, garantia, taller_id, email,
+            localidad, telefono, mano_obra, descuento,
+            matricula2, nombre2
+        } = body;
+
+        if (!fecha) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "El campo 'fecha' es obligatorio." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            `INSERT INTO albaranes (
+        fecha, perito_id, aseguradora_id, referencia_siniestro,
+        fecha_siniestro, matricula, nombre_cliente, vehiculo_tipo,
+        marca_id, modelo_id, garantia, taller_id, email,
+        localidad, telefono, mano_obra, descuento,
+        matricula2, nombre2
+      ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+            [
+                fecha, perito_id ?? null, aseguradora_id ?? null,
+                referencia_siniestro ?? null, fecha_siniestro ?? null,
+                matricula ?? null, nombre_cliente ?? null,
+                vehiculo_tipo ?? "TURISMO", marca_id ?? null,
+                modelo_id ?? null, garantia ?? "CONVENIO",
+                taller_id ?? null, email ?? null, localidad ?? null,
+                telefono ?? null, mano_obra ?? 0, descuento ?? 0,
+                matricula2 ?? null, nombre2 ?? null
+            ]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Albarán creado.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear albarán:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al crear el albarán." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}

index 0000000..ccfe2a3

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/aseguradoras — Lista todas las aseguradoras */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT * FROM aseguradoras ORDER BY nombre");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener aseguradoras:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/aseguradoras — Crea una nueva aseguradora */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { nombre, cif } = body as { nombre?: string; cif?: string };
+
+        if (!nombre) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "'nombre' es obligatorio." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO aseguradoras (nombre, cif) VALUES (?, ?)",
+            [nombre, cif ?? null]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Aseguradora creada.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear aseguradora:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/gastos/route.ts b/app/api/gastos/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7c1e3e6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/gastos/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/gastos — Lista todos los gastos con proveedor */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query(
+            `SELECT g.*, p.nombre AS proveedor_nombre, p.cif AS proveedor_cif
+       FROM gastos g
+       LEFT JOIN proveedores p ON g.proveedor_id = p.id
+       ORDER BY g.fecha DESC`
+        );
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener gastos:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/gastos — Crea un nuevo gasto */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { fecha, proveedor_id, num_factura, concepto, base_imponible, iva, retencion, total, fecha_pago } = body;
+
+        if (!fecha) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "'fecha' es obligatorio." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            `INSERT INTO gastos (fecha, proveedor_id, num_factura, concepto, base_imponible, iva, retencion, total, fecha_pago)
+       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+            [fecha, proveedor_id ?? null, num_factura ?? null, concepto ?? null,
+                base_imponible ?? 0, iva ?? 0, retencion ?? 0, total ?? 0, fecha_pago ?? null]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Gasto creado.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear gasto:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/marcas — Lista todas las marcas */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT * FROM marcas ORDER BY nombre");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener marcas:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/marcas — Crea una nueva marca */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { nombre } = body as { nombre?: string };
+
+        if (!nombre) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "'nombre' es obligatorio." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO marcas (nombre) VALUES (?)",
+            [nombre]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Marca creada.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear marca:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });

diff --git a/app/api/modelos/route.ts b/app/api/modelos/route.ts

+++ b/app/api/modelos/route.ts

+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/modelos — Lista todos los modelos con su marca */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query(
+            `SELECT mo.id, mo.nombre, mo.marca_id, m.nombre AS marca_nombre
+       FROM modelos mo
+       LEFT JOIN marcas m ON mo.marca_id = m.id
+       ORDER BY m.nombre, mo.nombre`
+        );
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener modelos:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/modelos — Crea un nuevo modelo */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { nombre, marca_id } = body as { nombre?: string; marca_id?: number };
+
+        if (!nombre || !marca_id) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "'nombre' y 'marca_id' son obligatorios." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO modelos (nombre, marca_id) VALUES (?, ?)",
+            [nombre, marca_id]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Modelo creado.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear modelo:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

diff --git a/app/api/proveedores/route.ts b/app/api/proveedores/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6508e91
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/proveedores/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/proveedores — Lista todos los proveedores */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT * FROM proveedores ORDER BY nombre");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener proveedores:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/proveedores — Crea un nuevo proveedor */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { archivar_como, nombre, cif, direccion, codigo_postal, localidad, email, ccc, web, telefono, fax } = body;
+
+        if (!nombre) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "'nombre' es obligatorio." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            `INSERT INTO proveedores (archivar_como, nombre, cif, direccion, codigo_postal, localidad, email, ccc, web, telefono, fax)
+       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
+            [archivar_como ?? null, nombre, cif ?? null, direccion ?? null, codigo_postal ?? null,
+            localidad ?? null, email ?? null, ccc ?? null, web ?? null, telefono ?? null, fax ?? null]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Proveedor creado.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear proveedor:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..16a276e

+++ b/app/api/talleres/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/** GET /api/talleres — Lista todos los talleres */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT * FROM talleres ORDER BY nombre");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener talleres:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}
+
+/** POST /api/talleres — Crea un nuevo taller */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { nombre, direccion, localidad, provincia, telefono, email } = body;
+
+        if (!nombre) {
+            return NextResponse.json({ error: "'nombre' es obligatorio." }, { status: 400 });
+        }
+
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO talleres (nombre, direccion, localidad, provincia, telefono, email) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
+            [nombre, direccion ?? null, localidad ?? null, provincia ?? null, telefono ?? null, email ?? null]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { message: "Taller creado.", id: Number(result.insertId) },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear taller:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: "Error interno." }, { status: 500 });
+    }
+}

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d717fc0

+++ b/app/codigos/NuevaAseguradoraForm.tsx

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+export default function NuevaAseguradoraForm() {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        nombre: "",
+        cif: "",
+    });
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
+        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
+    };
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/aseguradoras", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(formData),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setFormData({ nombre: "", cif: "" });
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh(); // Reload server component data
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear la aseguradora");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nueva Aseguradora
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nueva Aseguradora">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div>
+                        <label htmlFor="nombre" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                            Nombre de la Aseguradora *
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="text"
+                            id="nombre"
+                            name="nombre"
+                            value={formData.nombre}
+                            onChange={handleChange}
+                            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase"
+                            required
+                            autoFocus
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div>
+                        <label htmlFor="cif" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                            CIF
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="text"
+                            id="cif"
+                            name="cif"
+                            value={formData.cif}
+                            onChange={handleChange}
+                            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent font-mono uppercase"
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
+                        <button
+                            type="button"
+                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50"
+                        >
+                            Cancelar
+                        </button>
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isSubmitting}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50"
+                        >
+                            {isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Aseguradora"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );
+}

+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db";
+import NuevaAseguradoraForm from "./NuevaAseguradoraForm";
+
+interface AseguradoraRow {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    cif: string | null;
+    provincia: string | null;
+    localidad: string | null;
+}
+
+export default async function CodigosPage() {
+    const aseguradoras = await query<AseguradoraRow>(
+        "SELECT id, nombre, cif, provincia, localidad FROM aseguradoras ORDER BY id"
+    );
+
+    return (

+                </div>
+

+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis">{a.id}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-medium">{a.nombre}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-mono text-xs">{a.cif ?? "—"}</td>

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..8c4281a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/contabilidad/gastos/NuevoGastoForm.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,152 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+interface Proveedor {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+}
+
+export default function NuevoGastoForm({ proveedores }: { proveedores: Proveedor[] }) {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        fecha: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
+        proveedor_id: "",
+        num_factura: "",
+        concepto: "",
+        base_imponible: "",
+        iva: "",
+        retencion: "",
+        total: "",
+        fecha_pago: "",
+    });
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {
+        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
+    };
+
+    const autofillTotal = () => {
+        const base = parseFloat(formData.base_imponible) || 0;
+        const iva = parseFloat(formData.iva) || 0;
+        const retencion = parseFloat(formData.retencion) || 0;
+        const sum = base + iva - retencion;
+        setFormData((f) => ({ ...f, total: sum.toFixed(2) }));
+    };
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const payload = {
+                ...formData,
+                proveedor_id: formData.proveedor_id ? Number(formData.proveedor_id) : null,
+                base_imponible: parseFloat(formData.base_imponible) || 0,
+                iva: parseFloat(formData.iva) || 0,
+                retencion: parseFloat(formData.retencion) || 0,
+                total: parseFloat(formData.total) || 0,
+                fecha_pago: formData.fecha_pago || null,
+            };
+
+            const res = await fetch("/api/gastos", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(payload),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setFormData({
+                    fecha: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
+                    proveedor_id: "", num_factura: "", concepto: "",
+                    base_imponible: "", iva: "", retencion: "", total: "", fecha_pago: "",
+                });
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh();
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear el gasto");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nuevo Gasto
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nuevo Gasto" maxWidth="max-w-2xl">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="fecha" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Fecha *</label>
+                            <input type="date" id="fecha" name="fecha" value={formData.fecha} onChange={handleChange} required className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="num_factura" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Núm. Factura</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="num_factura" name="num_factura" value={formData.num_factura} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase font-mono" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="proveedor_id" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Proveedor</label>
+                            <select id="proveedor_id" name="proveedor_id" value={formData.proveedor_id} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent bg-white h-[42px]">
+                                <option value="">(Sin proveedor específico)</option>
+                                {proveedores.map(p => <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.nombre}</option>)}
+                            </select>
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="concepto" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Concepto</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="concepto" name="concepto" value={formData.concepto} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="base_imponible" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Base Imponible (€)</label>
+                            <input type="number" step="0.01" id="base_imponible" name="base_imponible" value={formData.base_imponible} onBlur={autofillTotal} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-right font-mono" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="iva" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">IVA (€)</label>
+                            <input type="number" step="0.01" id="iva" name="iva" value={formData.iva} onBlur={autofillTotal} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-right font-mono" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="retencion" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Retención (€)</label>
+                            <input type="number" step="0.01" id="retencion" name="retencion" value={formData.retencion} onBlur={autofillTotal} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-right font-mono" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="total" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Total (€)</label>
+                            <input type="number" step="0.01" id="total" name="total" value={formData.total} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-verde-principal bg-verde-claro/20 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-right font-mono font-bold" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2 pt-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="fecha_pago" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Fecha de Pago (Dejar vacío si está pendiente)</label>
+                            <input type="date" id="fecha_pago" name="fecha_pago" value={formData.fecha_pago} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                        </div>
+
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 mt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
+                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50">Cancelar</button>
+                        <button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting} className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50">{isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Gasto"}</button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );
+}
diff --git a/app/contabilidad/gastos/page.tsx b/app/contabilidad/gastos/page.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bf37263

+++ b/app/contabilidad/gastos/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db";
+import NuevoGastoForm from "./NuevoGastoForm";
+
+interface GastoRow {
+    id: number;
+    fecha: string;
+    proveedor_nombre: string | null;
+    proveedor_cif: string | null;
+    num_factura: string | null;
+    concepto: string | null;
+    base_imponible: number;
+    iva: number;
+    retencion: number;
+    total: number;
+    fecha_pago: string | null;
+}
+
+export default async function GastosPage() {
+    const gastos = await query<GastoRow>(
+        `SELECT g.id, g.fecha, g.num_factura, g.concepto,
+            g.base_imponible, g.iva, g.retencion, g.total, g.fecha_pago,
+            p.nombre AS proveedor_nombre, p.cif AS proveedor_cif
+     FROM gastos g
+     LEFT JOIN proveedores p ON g.proveedor_id = p.id
+     ORDER BY g.fecha DESC`
+    );
+
+    const proveedores = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT id, nombre FROM proveedores ORDER BY nombre");
+
+    const formatCurrency = (n: number) =>
+        new Intl.NumberFormat("es-ES", { style: "currency", currency: "EUR" }).format(n);
+
+    return (
+        <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo">
+            <Navbar />
+            <main className="max-w-[1700px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
+                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
+                    <div>
+                        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Gastos</h1>
+                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">{gastos.length} gastos registrados</p>
+                    </div>
+                    <NuevoGastoForm proveedores={proveedores} />
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
+                    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
+                        <table className="w-full text-sm">
+                            <thead>
+                                <tr className="bg-verde-principal text-white">
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Número</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Fecha</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Proveedor</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">CIF</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Factura</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Concepto</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Base</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">IVA</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Retención</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Total</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Fecha Pago</th>
+                                </tr>
+                            </thead>
+                            <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
+                                {gastos.map((g) => (
+                                    <tr key={g.id} className="hover:bg-verde-claro/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis">{g.id}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5">{new Date(g.fecha).toLocaleDateString("es-ES")}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-medium">{g.proveedor_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-mono text-xs">{g.proveedor_cif ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5">{g.num_factura ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5">{g.concepto ?? "—"}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 text-right font-mono">{formatCurrency(g.base_imponible)}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 text-right font-mono">{formatCurrency(g.iva)}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 text-right font-mono">{formatCurrency(g.retencion)}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5 text-right font-mono font-semibold">{formatCurrency(g.total)}</td>
+                                        <td className="px-4 py-2.5">
+                                            {g.fecha_pago
+                                                ? new Date(g.fecha_pago).toLocaleDateString("es-ES")
+                                                : <span className="text-amber-600 text-xs font-medium">Pendiente</span>
+                                            }
+                                        </td>
+                                    </tr>
+                                ))}
+                            </tbody>
+                        </table>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+            </main>
+        </div>
+    );

new file mode 100644
index 0000000..48d718b
