+++ b/app/contabilidad/proveedores/NuevoProveedorForm.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,138 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+export default function NuevoProveedorForm() {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        archivar_como: "",
+        nombre: "",
+        cif: "",
+        direccion: "",
+        codigo_postal: "",
+        localidad: "",
+        email: "",
+        ccc: "",
+        web: "",
+        telefono: "",
+        fax: "",
+    });
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
+        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
+    };
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/proveedores", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(formData),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setFormData({
+                    archivar_como: "", nombre: "", cif: "", direccion: "",
+                    codigo_postal: "", localidad: "", email: "", ccc: "",
+                    web: "", telefono: "", fax: ""
+                });
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh();
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear el proveedor");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nuevo Proveedor
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nuevo Proveedor" maxWidth="max-w-4xl">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="nombre" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Nombre Completo *</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="nombre" name="nombre" value={formData.nombre} onChange={handleChange} required autoFocus className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="archivar_como" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Archivar Como</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="archivar_como" name="archivar_como" value={formData.archivar_como} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="cif" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">CIF / NIF</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="cif" name="cif" value={formData.cif} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase font-mono" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="direccion" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Dirección</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="direccion" name="direccion" value={formData.direccion} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="codigo_postal" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">C.P.</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="codigo_postal" name="codigo_postal" value={formData.codigo_postal} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="localidad" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Localidad</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="localidad" name="localidad" value={formData.localidad} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="telefono" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Teléfono</label>
+                            <input type="tel" id="telefono" name="telefono" value={formData.telefono} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="fax" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Fax</label>
+                            <input type="tel" id="fax" name="fax" value={formData.fax} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent" />

+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="web" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Página Web</label>
+                            <input type="url" id="web" name="web" value={formData.web} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent text-sm" />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="md:col-span-3">
+                            <label htmlFor="ccc" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Cuenta Bancaria (CCC/IBAN)</label>
+                            <input type="text" id="ccc" name="ccc" value={formData.ccc} onChange={handleChange} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent font-mono uppercase tracking-widest" />
+                        </div>
+
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 mt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
+                        <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50">Cancelar</button>
+                        <button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting} className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50">{isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Proveedor"}</button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>

+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db";
+import NuevoProveedorForm from "./NuevoProveedorForm";
+
+interface ProveedorRow {
+    id: number;
+    archivar_como: string | null;
+    nombre: string;
+    cif: string | null;
+    direccion: string | null;
+    codigo_postal: string | null;
+    localidad: string | null;
+    email: string | null;
+    telefono: string | null;
+    web: string | null;
+}
+
+export default async function ProveedoresPage() {

+

+                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">{proveedores.length} proveedores registrados</p>
+                    </div>
+                    <NuevoProveedorForm />
+                </div>

+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">E-Mail</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Web</th>

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+export default function NuevaMarcaForm() {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [nombre, setNombre] = useState("");
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/marcas", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ nombre }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setNombre("");
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh(); // Reload server component data
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear la marca");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nueva Marca
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nueva Marca">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div>
+                        <label htmlFor="nombre" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                            Nombre de la Marca
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="text"
+                            id="nombre"
+                            value={nombre}
+                            onChange={(e) => setNombre(e.target.value)}
+                            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase"
+                            required
+                            autoFocus
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4">
+                        <button
+                            type="button"
+                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50"
+                        >
+                            Cancelar
+                        </button>
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isSubmitting}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50"
+                        >
+                            {isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Marca"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );
+}

diff --git a/app/modelos/NuevoModeloForm.tsx b/app/modelos/NuevoModeloForm.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a2e85c2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/modelos/NuevoModeloForm.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,110 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+interface Marca {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+}
+
+export default function NuevoModeloForm({ marcas }: { marcas: Marca[] }) {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [nombre, setNombre] = useState("");
+    const [marcaId, setMarcaId] = useState("");
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/modelos", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify({ nombre, marca_id: Number(marcaId) }),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setNombre("");
+                setMarcaId("");
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh(); // Reload server component data
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear el modelo");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nuevo Modelo
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nuevo Modelo">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div>
+                        <label htmlFor="marca" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                            Marca
+                        </label>
+                        <select
+                            id="marca"
+                            value={marcaId}
+                            onChange={(e) => setMarcaId(e.target.value)}
+                            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent bg-white"
+                            required
+                        >
+                            <option value="" disabled>Seleccione una marca...</option>
+                            {marcas.map((m) => (
+                                <option key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.nombre}</option>
+                            ))}
+                        </select>
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div>
+                        <label htmlFor="nombre" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                            Nombre del Modelo
+                        </label>
+                        <input
+                            type="text"
+                            id="nombre"
+                            value={nombre}
+                            onChange={(e) => setNombre(e.target.value)}
+                            className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            required
+                        />
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4">
+                        <button
+                            type="button"
+                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50"
+                        >
+                            Cancelar
+                        </button>
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isSubmitting}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50"
+                        >
+                            {isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Modelo"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );

+++ b/app/modelos/page.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";
+import { query } from "@/lib/db";
+import NuevoModeloForm from "./NuevoModeloForm";
+
+interface ModeloRow {
+    id: number;
+    nombre: string;
+    marca_id: number;
+    marca_nombre: string | null;
+}
+
+export default async function ModelosPage() {
+    const modelos = await query<ModeloRow>(
+        `SELECT mo.id, mo.nombre, mo.marca_id, m.nombre AS marca_nombre
+     FROM modelos mo
+     LEFT JOIN marcas m ON mo.marca_id = m.id
+     ORDER BY m.nombre, mo.nombre`
+    );
+
+    const marcas = await query<{ id: number, nombre: string }>("SELECT id, nombre FROM marcas ORDER BY nombre");
+
+    return (
+        <div className="min-h-screen bg-fondo">
+            <Navbar />
+            <main className="max-w-[1200px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
+                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
+                    <div>
+                        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Modelos</h1>
+                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">{modelos.length} modelos registrados</p>
+                    </div>
+                    <NuevoModeloForm marcas={marcas} />
+                </div>
+
+                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
+                    <table className="w-full text-sm">
+                        <thead>
+                            <tr className="bg-verde-principal text-white">
+                                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium w-24">ID</th>
+                                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Marca</th>
+                                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Modelo</th>
+                            </tr>
+                        </thead>
+                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
+                            {modelos.map((m) => (
+                                <tr key={m.id} className="hover:bg-verde-claro/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-verde-enfasis">{m.id}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5 font-medium">{m.marca_nombre ?? "—"}</td>
+                                    <td className="px-4 py-2.5">{m.nombre}</td>
+                                </tr>
+                            ))}
+                        </tbody>
+                    </table>
+                </div>
+            </main>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,170 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+import Modal from "@/components/Modal";
+
+export default function NuevoTallerForm() {
+    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
+        nombre: "",
+        direccion: "",
+        localidad: "",
+        provincia: "",
+        telefono: "",
+        email: "",
+    });
+    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
+    const router = useRouter();
+
+    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
+        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
+    };
+
+    const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
+        e.preventDefault();
+        setIsSubmitting(true);
+
+        try {
+            const res = await fetch("/api/talleres", {
+                method: "POST",
+                headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+                body: JSON.stringify(formData),
+            });
+
+            if (res.ok) {
+                setFormData({ nombre: "", direccion: "", localidad: "", provincia: "", telefono: "", email: "" });
+                setIsOpen(false);
+                router.refresh();
+            } else {
+                const error = await res.json();
+                alert(error.error || "Error al crear el taller");
+            }
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error(err);
+            alert("Error de red");
+        } finally {
+            setIsSubmitting(false);
+        }
+    };
+
+    return (
+        <>
+            <button
+                onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}
+                className="bg-verde-enfasis hover:bg-verde-oscuro text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors"
+            >
+                + Nuevo Taller
+            </button>
+
+            <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)} title="Añadir Nuevo Taller" maxWidth="max-w-2xl">
+                <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
+                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
+                        <div className="col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="nombre" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Nombre del Taller *
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="text"
+                                id="nombre"
+                                name="nombre"
+                                value={formData.nombre}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent uppercase"
+                                required
+                                autoFocus
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div className="col-span-2">
+                            <label htmlFor="direccion" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Dirección
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="text"
+                                id="direccion"
+                                name="direccion"
+                                value={formData.direccion}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="localidad" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Localidad
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="text"
+                                id="localidad"
+                                name="localidad"
+                                value={formData.localidad}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="provincia" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Provincia
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="text"
+                                id="provincia"
+                                name="provincia"
+                                value={formData.provincia}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="telefono" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Teléfono
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="tel"
+                                id="telefono"
+                                name="telefono"
+                                value={formData.telefono}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+
+                        <div>
+                            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
+                                Email
+                            </label>
+                            <input
+                                type="email"
+                                id="email"
+                                name="email"
+                                value={formData.email}
+                                onChange={handleChange}
+                                className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-verde-principal focus:border-transparent"
+                            />
+                        </div>
+                    </div>
+
+                    <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 mt-6 border-t border-gray-100">
+                        <button
+                            type="button"
+                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50"
+                        >
+                            Cancelar
+                        </button>
+                        <button
+                            type="submit"
+                            disabled={isSubmitting}
+                            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white bg-verde-principal rounded-lg hover:bg-verde-oscuro disabled:opacity-50"
+                        >
+                            {isSubmitting ? "Guardando..." : "Guardar Taller"}
+                        </button>
+                    </div>
+                </form>
+            </Modal>
+        </>
+    );

+import Navbar from "@/components/Navbar";

+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Teléfono</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Email</th>
+                                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Estado</th>
+                                </tr>
+                            </thead>
+                            <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">

diff --git a/components/Modal.tsx b/components/Modal.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4c0c570
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/Modal.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+"use client";
+
+import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
+import { X } from "lucide-react";
+
+interface ModalProps {
+    isOpen: boolean;
+    onClose: () => void;
+    title: string;
+    children: React.ReactNode;
+    maxWidth?: string;
+}
+
+export default function Modal({
+    isOpen,
+    onClose,
+    title,
+    children,
+    maxWidth = "max-w-md",
+}: ModalProps) {
+    const modalRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
+
+    // Close on Escape key
+    useEffect(() => {
+        const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
+            if (e.key === "Escape") onClose();
+        };
+        if (isOpen) {
+            document.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+            document.body.style.overflow = "hidden"; // Prevent background scrolling
+        }
+        return () => {
+            document.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+            document.body.style.overflow = "unset";
+        };
+    }, [isOpen, onClose]);
+
+    if (!isOpen) return null;
+
+    return (
+        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center">
+            {/* Backdrop */}
+            <div
+                className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity"
+                onClick={onClose}
+            />
+
+            {/* Modal Content */}
+            <div
+                ref={modalRef}
+                className={`relative w-full ${maxWidth} bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200 m-4 max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col`}
+            >
+                {/* Header */}
+                <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50">
+                    <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-verde-oscuro">{title}</h2>
+                    <button
+                        onClick={onClose}
+                        className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
+                    >
+                        <X className="w-5 h-5" />
+                    </button>
+                </div>
+
+                {/* Body (scrollable if too tall) */}
+                <div className="p-6 overflow-y-auto">{children}</div>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    );
+}

+"use client";
+
+import { useState } from "react";
+import Link from "next/link";
+import { ChevronDown } from "lucide-react";
+
+export default function Navbar() {
+    const [isContabilidadOpen, setIsContabilidadOpen] = useState(false);
+
+    // Modern Enterprise Styling
+    const navLinkStyle = "text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider py-2";
+    const dropdownItemStyle = "block px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-md";
+
+    return (
+        <nav className="w-full bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50">
+            <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
+                <div className="flex h-14 items-center gap-8">
+
+          {/* Logo or Brand */}
+          <div className="flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center w-64 border-r border-slate-200 h-full px-4">
+            <span className="text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-800">Peritaciones</span>
+            <span className="text-xl font-light text-slate-500 ml-1">Aguilera</span>
+          </div>
+
+                    <ul className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-between w-full ml-2 sm:ml-4">
+                        <li>
+                            <Link href="#" className={navLinkStyle}>
+                                ALBARANES
+                            </Link>
+                        </li>
+                        <li>
+                            <Link href="#" className={navLinkStyle}>
+                                TALLERES

+                                MARCA
+                            </Link>
+                        </li>

+                                MODELO
+                            </Link>
+                        </li>
+
+                        {/* Dropdown Container */}
+                        <li

+                            onMouseEnter={() => setIsContabilidadOpen(true)}

+                                        </li>

+                                            </Link>
+                                        </li>
+                                        <li>
+                                            <Link href="#" className={dropdownItemStyle}>
+                                                Contabilidad
+                                            </Link>
+                                        </li>

commit 88c8afc94795397a75ef33da6d2e573d4ee8cdb9
Author: jesuni2viznar <jesuni2viznar@gmail.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 10 09:53:15 2026 +0100

    Update: Esqueleto de base de datos y datos de prueba creados
---

diff --git a/db/schema.sql b/db/schema.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..07e0fc5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/db/schema.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,255 @@
+-- ============================================================
+-- Peritaciones Aguilera — Esquema de Base de Datos
+-- Motor: MariaDB / InnoDB
+-- Charset: utf8mb4 (soporte completo de caracteres españoles)
+-- ============================================================
+
+CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS peritaciones
+  CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
+  COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
+
+USE peritaciones;
+
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+-- CATÁLOGOS
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+-- Peritos / Tasadores
+CREATE TABLE peritos (
+  id          INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  nombre      VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
+  apellidos   VARCHAR(150)  NOT NULL,
+  telefono    VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  email       VARCHAR(150)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  activo      TINYINT(1)    NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+  created_at  TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at  TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Aseguradoras (Compañías de seguros)
+CREATE TABLE aseguradoras (
+  id                      INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  nombre                  VARCHAR(200)  NOT NULL,
+  cif                     VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  provincia               VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  direccion               VARCHAR(250)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  localidad               VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  codigo_postal           VARCHAR(10)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  normativa               VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+
+  -- Precios unitarios
+  precio_fotos            DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  precio_kilometros       DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  vehiculo_ausente        DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  verificacion_riesgo     DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+
+  -- Tarifas fijas
+  comprobacion_danos      DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  asistencia_juzgados     DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_global          DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_1               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_2               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_3               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_4               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_5               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  forfait_6               DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  informe_lugar_siniestro DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  siniestro_total         DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  media_dieta             DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  dieta_completa          DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+
+  created_at  TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at  TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Tramos de tarificación por aseguradora (Desde/Hasta/Fijo/Porcentaje)
+CREATE TABLE aseguradoras_tramos (
+  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  aseguradora_id  INT UNSIGNED  NOT NULL,
+  desde           DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  hasta           DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  fijo            DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  porcentaje      DECIMAL(5,2)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_tramos_aseguradora
+    FOREIGN KEY (aseguradora_id) REFERENCES aseguradoras(id)
+    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Marcas de vehículos
+CREATE TABLE marcas (
+  id      INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  nombre  VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Modelos de vehículos (vinculados a marca)
+CREATE TABLE modelos (
+  id        INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  marca_id  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
+  nombre    VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_modelos_marca
+    FOREIGN KEY (marca_id) REFERENCES marcas(id)
+    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+
+  UNIQUE KEY uk_marca_modelo (marca_id, nombre)
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Talleres mecánicos
+CREATE TABLE talleres (
+  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  nombre          VARCHAR(200)  NOT NULL,
+  direccion       VARCHAR(250)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  codigo_postal   VARCHAR(10)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  localidad       VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  provincia       VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  telefono        VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  email           VARCHAR(150)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  contacto        VARCHAR(150)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  activo          TINYINT(1)    NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
+  created_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+-- TABLA PRINCIPAL: ALBARANES
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+CREATE TABLE albaranes (
+  id                  INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  fecha               DATE          NOT NULL,
+  perito_id           INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+  aseguradora_id      INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+  referencia_siniestro VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  fecha_siniestro     DATE          DEFAULT NULL,
+  matricula           VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  nombre_cliente      VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
+
+  vehiculo_tipo       ENUM('TURISMO','FURGONETA','CAMION','MOTO','OTRO')
+                      NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TURISMO',
+
+  marca_id            INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+  modelo_id           INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+
+  garantia            ENUM('CONVENIO','LUNAS','TR SF','OTRO')
+                      NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CONVENIO',
+
+  taller_id           INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+  email               VARCHAR(150)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  localidad           VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  telefono            VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  mano_obra           DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  descuento           DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+
+  -- Segundo vehículo / conductor
+  matricula2          VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  nombre2             VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
+
+  -- Flags / Estado
+  aviso               VARCHAR(50)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  gestion             ENUM('SEGUIMIENTO','DESMONTAJES','AUSENTE')
+                      DEFAULT NULL,
+  estado              ENUM('EN CURSO','CERRADO','AUSENTE')
+                      NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EN CURSO',
+
+  -- Checkboxes de filtro
+  comprobacion_danos      TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+  gestiones_c_danos       TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+  fraude_parcial          TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+  fraude_total            TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+  vises_no_conformes      TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+
+  created_at  TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at  TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+
+  -- Foreign Keys
+  CONSTRAINT fk_albaranes_perito
+    FOREIGN KEY (perito_id) REFERENCES peritos(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_albaranes_aseguradora
+    FOREIGN KEY (aseguradora_id) REFERENCES aseguradoras(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_albaranes_marca
+    FOREIGN KEY (marca_id) REFERENCES marcas(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_albaranes_modelo
+    FOREIGN KEY (modelo_id) REFERENCES modelos(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_albaranes_taller
+    FOREIGN KEY (taller_id) REFERENCES talleres(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Índices para filtros frecuentes
+CREATE INDEX idx_albaranes_fecha       ON albaranes(fecha);
+CREATE INDEX idx_albaranes_estado      ON albaranes(estado);
+CREATE INDEX idx_albaranes_matricula   ON albaranes(matricula);
+CREATE INDEX idx_albaranes_referencia  ON albaranes(referencia_siniestro);
+
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+-- IMÁGENES / DOCUMENTOS DEL ALBARÁN
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+CREATE TABLE albaranes_imagenes (
+  id          INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  albaran_id  INT UNSIGNED  NOT NULL,
+  filename    VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
+  ruta        VARCHAR(500)  NOT NULL,
+  tipo        ENUM('IMAGEN','PDF','OTRO') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IMAGEN',
+  tamano      INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Tamaño en bytes',
+  created_at  TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_imagenes_albaran
+    FOREIGN KEY (albaran_id) REFERENCES albaranes(id)
+    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+CREATE INDEX idx_imagenes_albaran ON albaranes_imagenes(albaran_id);
+
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+-- CONTABILIDAD
+-- ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+-- Proveedores
+CREATE TABLE proveedores (
+  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  archivar_como   VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  nombre          VARCHAR(200)  NOT NULL,
+  cif             VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  direccion       VARCHAR(250)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  codigo_postal   VARCHAR(10)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  localidad       VARCHAR(100)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  email           VARCHAR(150)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  ccc             VARCHAR(30)   DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Cuenta bancaria',
+  web             VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  telefono        VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  fax             VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  created_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+-- Gastos
+CREATE TABLE gastos (
+  id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
+  fecha           DATE          NOT NULL,
+  proveedor_id    INT UNSIGNED  DEFAULT NULL,
+  num_factura     VARCHAR(50)   DEFAULT NULL,
+  concepto        VARCHAR(300)  DEFAULT NULL,
+  base_imponible  DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  iva             DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  retencion       DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  total           DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
+  fecha_pago      DATE          DEFAULT NULL,
+  created_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+  updated_at      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+
+  CONSTRAINT fk_gastos_proveedor
+    FOREIGN KEY (proveedor_id) REFERENCES proveedores(id)
+    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
+) ENGINE=InnoDB;
+
+CREATE INDEX idx_gastos_fecha ON gastos(fecha);

diff --git a/middleware.ts b/middleware.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6f9e140
--- /dev/null
+++ b/middleware.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import type { NextRequest } from "next/server";
+
+// Almacén en memoria para el rate limiting (simple demo)
+// En producción, se recomienda usar Redis o Upstash
+const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; lastReset: number }>();
+
+const LIMIT = 100; // Máximo 100 peticiones
+const WINDOW = 60 * 1000; // Por minuto (60,000 ms)
+
+export function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
+    const ip = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-for") ?? "127.0.0.1";
+    const now = Date.now();
+
+    const rateData = rateLimitMap.get(ip) ?? { count: 0, lastReset: now };
+
+    // Reiniciar si ha pasado la ventana de tiempo
+    if (now - rateData.lastReset > WINDOW) {
+        rateData.count = 0;
+        rateData.lastReset = now;
+    }
+
+    rateData.count++;
+    rateLimitMap.set(ip, rateData);
+
+    if (rateData.count > LIMIT) {
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Demasiadas peticiones. Por favor, inténtalo más tarde." },
+            { status: 429 }
+        );
+    }
+
+    return NextResponse.next();
+}
+
+/**
+ * Solo aplicar a las rutas de la API
+ */
+export const config = {
+    matcher: "/api/:path*",
+};

+                    },
+                    {
+                        key: "X-Frame-Options",
+                        value: "DENY",
+                    },
+                    {
+                        key: "X-Content-Type-Options",
+                        value: "nosniff",
+                    },
+                    {
+                        key: "Referrer-Policy",
+                        value: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin",
+                    },
+                    {

+                        value: "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()",

             {
                 message: "Imagen subida correctamente.",
@@ -86,3 +99,39 @@ export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
         );
     }
 }
+
+/**
+ * Valida si los bytes de cabecera corresponden a una firma de imagen conocida.
+ */
+function isValidImageSignature(header: Uint8Array): boolean {
+    // JPEG: FF D8 FF
+    if (header[0] === 0xff && header[1] === 0xd8 && header[2] === 0xff) return true;
+
+    // PNG: 89 50 4E 47
+    if (
+        header[0] === 0x89 &&
+        header[1] === 0x50 &&
+        header[2] === 0x4e &&
+        header[3] === 0x47
+    )
+        return true;
+
+    // GIF: 47 49 46 38
+    if (
+        header[0] === 0x47 &&
+        header[1] === 0x49 &&
+        header[2] === 0x46 &&
+        header[3] === 0x38
+    )
+        return true;
+
+    // WebP: RIFF (0-3) + WEBP (8-11)
+    if (
+        header[0] === 0x52 && header[1] === 0x49 && header[2] === 0x46 && header[3] === 0x46 &&
+        header[8] === 0x57 && header[9] === 0x45 && header[10] === 0x42 && header[11] === 0x50
+    ) {
+        return true;
+    }
+
+    return false;
+}

diff --git a/app/api/peritajes/route.ts b/app/api/peritajes/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..932e48e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/peritajes/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { query, execute } from "@/lib/db";
+
+/**
+ * GET /api/peritajes
+ *
+ * Devuelve todos los peritajes. Placeholder para futuro filtrado/paginación.
+ */
+export async function GET() {
+    try {
+        const rows = await query("SELECT * FROM peritajes ORDER BY id DESC");
+        return NextResponse.json(rows);
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al obtener peritajes:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al consultar peritajes." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * POST /api/peritajes
+ *
+ * Crea un nuevo peritaje. Espera un JSON con los campos del peritaje.
+ * Ejemplo de body:
+ *   { "vehiculo": "ABC-1234", "descripcion": "Daño frontal" }
+ */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        const body = await request.json();
+        const { vehiculo, descripcion } = body as {
+            vehiculo?: string;
+            descripcion?: string;
+        };
+
+        // Validación básica
+        if (!vehiculo || !descripcion) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "Los campos 'vehiculo' y 'descripcion' son obligatorios." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        // INSERT con prepared statement
+        const result = await execute(
+            "INSERT INTO peritajes (vehiculo, descripcion) VALUES (?, ?)",
+            [vehiculo, descripcion]
+        );
+
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            {
+                message: "Peritaje creado correctamente.",
+                id: Number(result.insertId),
+            },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al crear peritaje:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al crear el peritaje." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}
diff --git a/app/api/upload/route.ts b/app/api/upload/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c8a0166
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/api/upload/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,88 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+import { writeFile, mkdir } from "fs/promises";
+import path from "path";
+import crypto from "crypto";
+
+/**
+ * Directorio donde se guardan las imágenes subidas.
+ * Se lee de la variable de entorno UPLOAD_DIR.
+ * Ejemplo en .env.local:
+ *   UPLOAD_DIR=C:/peritajes/imagenes
+ */
+const UPLOAD_DIR = process.env.UPLOAD_DIR ?? "./uploads";
+
+/** Extensiones de imagen permitidas */
+const ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = new Set([".jpg", ".jpeg", ".png", ".webp", ".gif"]);
+
+/** Tamaño máximo permitido: 10 MB */
+const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024;
+
+/**
+ * POST /api/upload
+ *
+ * Recibe una imagen vía multipart/form-data (campo "file"),
+ * la valida, genera un nombre único y la guarda en disco.
+ */
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+    try {
+        // 1. Parsear el FormData nativo
+        const formData = await request.formData();
+        const file = formData.get("file");
+
+        if (!file || !(file instanceof Blob)) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: "No se recibió ningún archivo. Envía un campo 'file'." },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        // 2. Validar extensión
+        const originalName = (file as File).name ?? "archivo";
+        const extension = path.extname(originalName).toLowerCase();
+
+        if (!ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS.has(extension)) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                {
+                    error: `Extensión '${extension}' no permitida. Usa: ${[...ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS].join(", ")}`,
+                },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        // 3. Validar tamaño
+        if (file.size > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
+            return NextResponse.json(
+                { error: `El archivo excede el límite de ${MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024 / 1024} MB.` },
+                { status: 400 }
+            );
+        }
+
+        // 4. Generar nombre único: timestamp + UUID + extensión original
+        const uniqueName = `${Date.now()}-${crypto.randomUUID()}${extension}`;
+
+        // 5. Asegurar que el directorio de destino existe
+        await mkdir(UPLOAD_DIR, { recursive: true });
+
+        // 6. Leer contenido del archivo y escribir en disco
+        const buffer = Buffer.from(await file.arrayBuffer());
+        const filePath = path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, uniqueName);
+        await writeFile(filePath, buffer);
+
+        // 7. Responder con la info del archivo guardado
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            {
+                message: "Imagen subida correctamente.",
+                filename: uniqueName,
+                size: file.size,
+                path: filePath,
+            },
+            { status: 201 }
+        );
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error("Error al subir imagen:", error);
+        return NextResponse.json(
+            { error: "Error interno al procesar la subida." },
+            { status: 500 }
+        );
+    }
+}

diff --git a/lib/db.ts b/lib/db.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..efa2e09
--- /dev/null
+++ b/lib/db.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,94 @@
+import * as mariadb from "mariadb";
+
+/**
+ * Pool de conexiones a MariaDB.
+ *
+ * Las credenciales se leen de variables de entorno definidas en .env.local.
+ * Todas las consultas deben ejecutarse con prepared statements para
+ * prevenir inyecciones SQL:
+ *
+ *   const conn = await getConnection();
+ *   try {
+ *     const rows = await conn.execute("SELECT * FROM vehiculos WHERE id = ?", [id]);
+ *   } finally {
+ *     conn.release();
+ *   }
+ */
+
+const pool = mariadb.createPool({
+    host: process.env.DB_HOST ?? "localhost",
+    port: Number(process.env.DB_PORT ?? 3306),
+    user: process.env.DB_USER ?? "root",
+    password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD ?? "",
+    database: process.env.DB_NAME ?? "peritaciones",
+    connectionLimit: Number(process.env.DB_POOL_SIZE ?? 5),
+});
+
+// ---------- Tipos auxiliares ----------
+
+/** Resultado genérico de un SELECT */
+export type QueryResult<T = Record<string, unknown>> = T[];
+
+/** Resultado de INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE */
+export interface MutationResult {
+    affectedRows: number;
+    insertId: bigint;
+    warningStatus: number;
+}
+
+// ---------- Funciones públicas ----------
+
+/**
+ * Obtiene una conexión del pool.
+ * ⚠️  SIEMPRE liberar la conexión con conn.release() en un bloque finally.
+ */
+export async function getConnection() {
+    return pool.getConnection();
+}
+
+/**
+ * Ejecuta un SELECT con prepared statement y devuelve las filas tipadas.
+ *
+ * @example
+ *   const vehiculos = await query<Vehiculo>("SELECT * FROM vehiculos WHERE placa = ?", ["ABC123"]);
+ */
+export async function query<T = Record<string, unknown>>(
+    sql: string,
+    params: unknown[] = []
+): Promise<QueryResult<T>> {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        // conn.execute() usa prepared statements de forma nativa
+        const rows = await conn.execute(sql, params);
+        return rows as QueryResult<T>;
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Ejecuta un INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE con prepared statement.
+ *
+ * @example
+ *   const result = await execute(
+ *     "INSERT INTO vehiculos (placa, marca) VALUES (?, ?)",
+ *     ["ABC123", "Toyota"]
+ *   );
+ *   console.log(result.insertId);
+ */
+export async function execute(
+    sql: string,
+    params: unknown[] = []
+): Promise<MutationResult> {
+    let conn;
+    try {
+        conn = await pool.getConnection();
+        const result = await conn.execute(sql, params);
+        return result as unknown as MutationResult;
+    } finally {
+        if (conn) conn.release();
+    }
+}
+
+export default pool;
